name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=27s=20iPhone?=
subject: Why I'm Running for Governor
body:
I’m running for Governor to be that leader and restore NJ to its rightful place as a global leader in industry, innovation, and individual freedom. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/icymi-my-op-ed-on-townhallcom-418076?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5cafed596a&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend, In my Op-Ed this morning on [TownHall.com](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=e4ddd46b79&e=3e017fab0f), I said,

_New Jersey voters cast nearly 350,000 more ballots for President Trump in 2020 than they did in 2016 – even with the dubious mail-in voting practices put in place at the 11th hour by Democrat Governor Phil Murphy._

While most of our so-called Republican leaders were silent on Murphy's shenanigans, I took him to court and fought to hold him accountable when no one else would.

Now these same Republican "leaders" are falling-in line behind a failed, self-proclaimed moderate Republican who has called President Trump a "charlatan" and who said the 2020 election was "fair."

But you can learn more about my conservative platform of lower taxes, reduced state spending, school choice, fair elections, and the unequivocal protection of our God-given rights to life, liberty, property, self-defense,

Read my [Op-Ed](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=8c78e492c3&e=3e017fab0f) and join my campaign today!
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Republican for NJ Governor
## _For the People_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5c0a8de1a1&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE")

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Joe Biden Hates America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
body:
Peter,
Just the other day, Joe Biden addressed the
nation and declared that he can now decide which parts of the
Bill of Rights apply…and which ones don't.
The media gave him a standing ovation because
they either don't understand how scary that statement was, or
they don't care.
They don't care that the Founding Fathers of
this nation amended the Constitution in 1791 with the ten most
essential Rights that citizens need to protect themselves from a
tyrannical government.
They don't care that the right to bear arms
is the second most important check on government power
established to protect the people of this nation.
They don't care that the government that can
forcibly take your arms (even from law-abiding citizens) is the
same government that can take your freedom without due process if
you step out of line.
They even have their friends in Big Tech
working alongside them to take away your First Amendment rights!
They think they are untouchable!
They are wrong - that's why I am fighting so
hard. Fighting for your rights is why I'm here in Washington,
and I won't give up until we put an end to the leftist attacks on
our Constitutional Rights.
Joe Biden and his leftist cohorts hate
America - they show it every day through their actions and their
contempt for the rights of its citizens. They will change any
part of the Constitution to force their socialist nightmare on
America.
And now they've recruited an army of censors
in the Big Tech conglomerates to silence our voices and keep
Americans from learning the truth. They use their friends in
these woke companies to help them dictate what you see, hear, or
buy, essentially using them to propagandize against an entire
citizenry to accept their progressive agenda while simultaneously
propping up violent organizations like Antifa.
They censor anything they don't like, from
daily devotionals containing Bible passages to ads about the
latest guns, and of course, conservative politics. Who are they
to determine what you should like or should buy?
America is a nation that thrives on ideas in
the public square, embraces free enterprise, and refuses to
permit liberal corporations to stifle the people's voice.
If you agree, then stand with me before our
freedom is lost forever.
When the leader of the radical left tells you
that "no Amendment is absolute," you should be worried, but you
should not give up.
Because of our Lord, my family, and patriots
like you, I'm still standing tall here against their attacks on
the American people, and I need to know if you are still standing
with me.
For America,

Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri

STAND WITH JOSH

PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
SENATE

Please take a minute to read the special message from our
sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

© 2021 USA Freedom Fighters

name: Emily Cupples
subject: BREAKING: Beat Bill Lee and stop the power grab from out-of-touch harmful fringe conservatives
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC
body:
Peter
Today, Tennesseans from across the state filed a political action committee against Governor Bill Lee’s bid for re-election in 2022. Since Bill Lee took office 7 rural hospitals closed (including 4 during the COVID19 pandemic), unemployment reached an all time high, gun violence increased by 50%, and our student proficiency dropped. He spent $7 million in taxpayer funds on lawsuits. It is evident Lee is serving dark money interest groups and not Tennessee families.
We cannot wait until 3 months out from election day, when the primary is over, to start mobilizing against Lee. We must stop him and the dark money interest groups he represents from their continued destruction of Tennessee. The work to Beat Bill Lee begins today.
We need you to join us in this fight to beat Bill Lee and the fringe conservative groups he represents. Will you join us by making a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]
$5, $10, $100, every dollar counts. Funded by small dollar donations, we will use funds raised to organize hard working families across Tennessee and America to mobilize against the power grab by Bill Lee and others like him.
We cannot do this without your support. Will you be a founding donor and help us launch? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]
Thank you for joining us in this important work to save our state.
Let's Beat Bill Lee!
- Emily Cupples, Beat Bill Lee PAC Director
Make a Donation to Beat Bill Lee! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]PS- Don't forget to follow us on social media!

subject: FWD: Launching a CRITICAL effort today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Hey Peter, Kevin wrote you yesterday – did you see his message? If you missed it, please review it now (see below) **[and respond ASAP](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d02d048986f2bdb4/f68e921f6237076bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. Today is Day 100 of the Biden presidency, and it’s been the disaster we’d predicted it would be all along. These extreme-left Democrats in Washington want to ram through as much of their agenda as they possibly can, as quickly as they possibly can – from tax hikes to amnesty for illegal immigrants to gun grabs to their INSANE anti-police nonsense. It’s vital that we keep our grassroots fundraising efforts on track, Peter. We need to GET OUT OUR MESSAGE and GROW TEAM HERN, and we need your help! Again, please read more below from Kevin. And **[make a $5, $10, or $25 donation to help us reach our April goa](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d02d048986f2bdb4/b453b3c1b609f86cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)l**. Our deadline is coming up fast TOMORROW at 11:59 p.m. \- Team Hern | |
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d02d048986f2bdb4/aa588435c6bfd571c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Peter,

You’ve seen the headlines. You know what’s at stake.

This week we’ll mark Joe Biden’s First 100 Days in office, and he’s been busy. During his first days in office, he issued a RECORD number of executive orders – igniting the Biden Border Crisis, killing energy jobs, and now coming after our Second Amendment rights.

He’s also been working hand in hand with Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi to ram through the most extreme left-wing agenda our nation has ever seen...

**And it’s clear that they want to secure PERMANENT Democrat majorities, by federalizing our elections (to impose their lax standards) and granting statehood to Washington, D.C. **

The latter is a clear attempt to _PACK THE U.S. SENATE_ with two additional Democrats!

We need to defeat their radical agenda and defeat them at the ballot box.

Your support is CRUCIAL, Peter.

**[🚨 Please send an April end-of-month contribution to help keep our efforts on track!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d02d048986f2bdb4/c5ae178431933421c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
[**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d02d048986f2bdb4/44aa05beee26b396c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
I’m proud to be leading the charge to protect jobs, secure our border, and rein in out-of-control spending in Washington. There is no question we have major challenges ahead of us under this Biden administration, and I’m grateful to have you on board.

**We cannot afford to grow discouraged or give up. We MUST fight for America’s future.**

That’s why my volunteer team and I have been hitting the phones recently, to get out the message about the Biden agenda directly to voters. We’re not going to let up.

**[Pitch in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 today, or more if you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d02d048986f2bdb4/d36bf28b3c5fa3abc3d6b838967d376c/34143)**.

Thank you in advance for ANY donation you can help with as we close out April!

Sincerely,

Kevin Hern
[**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/d02d048986f2bdb4/43ae565931fc9d03c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Rep. Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Let's Elect Judge Dumas to Commonwealth Court!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
Dear Friend,

I'm writing to ask for your support for my friend, Judge Lori Dumas, in her campaign for Commonwealth Court this May.

Judge Dumas has nearly two decades of experience on the bench serving the citizens of Philadelphia as a Common Pleas Judge. There she has fought for fair and equal justice for our most vulnerable children and families. Recommended by the PA Bar Association, she is now running to bring that same commitment to equal justice to the Commonwealth Court.

[_Can you support Judge Dumas with a contribution today to help her in her campaign for Commonwealth Court?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28396517/283104317/1565234157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzM3ZjVhMi1mZWE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXpLwgYEy-tsMjLKTK-Rf58ZG3s_iB09tVUM3uiQk2k=&emci=43fdcc21-faa8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=c737f5a2-fea8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776)

When elected, Judge Dumas would be the _only person of color_ on Pennsylvanina's Commonwealth Court and I think we all agree that diverse voices and diverse experience matter now more than ever - especially in our courtrooms.

The Commonwealth Court needs someone like Judge Dumas and her commitment to fair and equal justice. She's prepared, passionate, and will bring a new perspective - that's why I am supporting her election.

[_Please join me by making a contribution to her campaign today and by committing to vote for her on May 18th._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28396518/283104318/1565234157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzM3ZjVhMi1mZWE4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXpLwgYEy-tsMjLKTK-Rf58ZG3s_iB09tVUM3uiQk2k=&emci=43fdcc21-faa8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=c737f5a2-fea8-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776)

\- MK

PO Box 40606
Phialdelpha, PA 19107
United States

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Join Elizabeth Warren and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We must pass Universal Child Care.
#

Last night in his address to Congress, President Biden said we must provide high-quality affordable child care for all children under the age of 5.
**Senator Elizabeth Warren and I are on it — I’m proud to announce that earlier this week, we introduced the _Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act_ , which would ensure universal access to child care and pre-K.**
Every family, regardless of income or employment, deserves to have high-quality, affordable child care options from birth to Kindergarten. But across the country, many families have to spend more on child care than they do on food, housing, or health care.
**[We must pass the _Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act_ to alleviate this burden on low-income families and ensure that all children in this country are well cared for. Become a citizen co-sponsor of our bill by adding your name to our petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28398065/283109525/-516062578?refcode2=c08848cb-02a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210429-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDg4NDhjYi0wMmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ruJe4hfph0mgDskcN6EaRqQ9Tq3xdym4xkP2u0h2hKA=&emci=46ca6f61-9da7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=c08848cb-02a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896)**
I know firsthand how important this bill is for working families. I am the child of a single mother who worked multiple jobs just to get by. When she could not afford the cost of child care, my grandmother would take me to work with her cleaning homes.
Universal child care doesn’t just help working parents. It also sets children from low-income families up to succeed. High-quality child care and pre-K programs help children prepare for school and support their cognitive and behavioral development.
The support that children receive as babies and toddlers can help set them up for success for the rest of their childhood. Without high-quality care, children from low-income families will show up to kindergarten behind their peers from wealthier families.
**[Please show your support for the _Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act_ by adding your name to our petition and becoming a citizen co-sponsor. We must ensure that all of our children — not just ones from wealthy families — have a fair opportunity to reach their full potential.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28398066/283109529/-516062578?refcode2=c08848cb-02a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210429-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDg4NDhjYi0wMmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ruJe4hfph0mgDskcN6EaRqQ9Tq3xdym4xkP2u0h2hKA=&emci=46ca6f61-9da7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=c08848cb-02a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896)**
Thank you for standing with Senator Warren and me on this critical issue. It feels great to have a president who cares about all Americans — an executive who uses government as a force for good. Now let’s build on this momentum and get progressive policies passed that will transform lives.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: We must pass Universal Child Care. Last night in his address to Congress, President Biden said we must provide high-quality affordable child care for all children under the age of 5. Senator Elizabeth Warren and I are on it — I’m proud to announce that earlier this week, we introduced the Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act , which would ensure universal access to child care and pre-K. Every family, regardless of income or employment, deserves to have high-quality, affordable child care options from birth to Kindergarten. But across the country, many families have to spend more on child care than they do on food, housing, or health care. I know firsthand how important this bill is for working families. I am the child of a single mother who worked multiple jobs just to get by. When she could not afford the cost of child care, my grandmother would take me to work with her cleaning homes. Universal child care doesn’t just help working parents. It also sets children from low-income families up to succeed. High-quality child care and pre-K programs help children prepare for school and support their cognitive and behavioral development. The support that children receive as babies and toddlers can help set them up for success for the rest of their childhood. Without high-quality care, children from low-income families will show up to kindergarten behind their peers from wealthier families. Thank you for standing with Senator Warren and me on this critical issue. It feels great to have a president who cares about all Americans — an executive who uses government as a force for good. Now let’s build on this momentum and get progressive policies passed that will transform lives. Onward, Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Quid Pro Joe Biden Impeached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter -- Joe Biden's State of the Union address was packed-full
of the Democrats' Socialist wish list.
Quid Pro Joe is abusing his power as
President just like he did as Vice President.
And that's exactly why I filed Articles of
Impeachment on Joe Biden.

75 million Americans are fed up with
inaction.
It's time to take a stand. Will you become a
citizen co-sponsor?

For four straight years, the Democrats and
the Fake News Media tried to impeach and remove President Trump
from office.
They put our country through hell alleging
"Russian collusion" without a shred of evidence! Nancy Pelosi's
House even voted to impeach Trump not once - but TWICE!
And when evidence came to light showing that
Joe Biden did everything the Democrats and the Fake News claimed
President Trump did, nothing happened.
Enough is enough. I'm tired of the Swampy
double standard!
Quid pro-Joe Biden abused his power as Vice
President. Americans will not tolerate this. I will NOT tolerate
it.
That's why I filed Articles of Impeachment on
Joe Biden.
I need you to join this fight: become a
Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your "Impeach Joe Biden" petition!
After you sign, I'm asking you to please
consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15
-- whatever you can most afford -- to the "Impeach Joe Biden
Fund" and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE
BIDEN.
The Biden Crime Family must be held
accountable.
So please, after you become a citizen
co-sponsor to impeach Joe Biden, consider donating before the
deadline.
I'll keep you updated.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

We’ve had enough with politicians pretending to care about us. It’s time working people had a voice of our own in Washington.

[So we need you to stay in this fight. Your donation will help us reach Pennsylvanians across the Commonwealth with our message of a better future for working families.
Thanks,
Team Malcolm

body:

---

Friend,

Did you see Joe Biden's speech last night? Clearly, the Democratic party we see today is NOT your grandfather's Democratic party.

❌ Canceling the Keystone XL Pipeline
❌ Revoking Second Amendment
❌ Obliterating Girls Sports
❌ Raising Taxes

... and Leslie Rutledge has sued them every single time. In her own words, _**" I wake up every morning wondering how I will have to sue Pres. Biden".**_
---
| | | [JOIN HER FIGHT -> STAND UP TO JOE BIDEN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eoDg_uDlC7aDEkhVNMtqXE94yf6N2dx-NmwYoIKVp0ws1riXBClu4LbvA5NmSYiGUlTWqeTLOKy-bxf-PfMnur3apX7Bc1izNBQhkKGCQIK1J46dcoactGiGXDYbUHiwIIA_gnRhSAbo-kz-BEdLOJa7j59pXvfTAWypAv3cw6NY-5vLCF7vUXRDdg4Auv_MDBfPSBa6pcO0133R_3HSw87mrUM-RJqlct9Ht-ncrak6hn3iRovSd4r56rj6nW0kyTEISu7AtrAQK0jU6Zor7270qT_0-zv4VpSxL03_k9thgYcKjpVmHmSRlqPyZkyTXykF2525uEEhM6JylMcVGO-HaU5-4Jk6Sr4Zn1K7b_5MdPtFz0glKZHcyHVN-WlHlZrnHvG80kkfu62t2OdBQ2xCbPXuwDvFXgar3EjCQwIsACyw8xtOxMsMkuVrq_OQKAJUg9vof5I2T4lu1XV4n7kB-gpy7xwM3_-xw_n6g54=&c=9dFrrLDRI3Sl3-Cpon3lamfznp2aaZFihk-zD92RallE75pWLfNpnA==&ch=VYbYCD1Fkyo81_WGqKcHEBiwXkRpaxnsLhsiI7WSCrNKs213fnUOQw== "JOIN HER FIGHT → STAND UP TO JOE BIDEN")
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, On Wednesday night, Tucker Carlson spoke out about the recent political hit job against Matt Gaetz. Tucker lays out how the federal government has become more aggressive than ever in using the force of law to crush political dissent, and how their latest target is Matt Gaetz: | | | | | We have been attacked with extortion, leaks to the media, and false allegations - all while CNN runs their "propaganda" campaign against us. We're taking fire from both sides of the Establishment and the media, but Tucker Carlson fires back against it all. We're thankful to have Tucker Carlson on our side. He's not afraid to stand up to the Establishment and the federal government for overreaching their power to crush their political opponents. If you're with Tucker, we need you to so we can stand our ground. | | | | Matt is one of the few people left in D.C. that is standing between us and the Swamp that wants to destroy our country. They will keep coming after us, regular American citizens with different points of view, unless we stop them. | | | | Thank you! name: Tim Scott
subject: My speech to America was just the start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
I’m so thankful to have been given the opportunity to share our positive and hopeful message with the American people. Friend, I meant what I said in my response to President Biden’s first address to Congress. Every word. **From cotton to Congress in one lifetime. That’s the story of my family and my American Dream. And that’s why I believe, with the right decisions, the next century can be better than the last.** [**DONATE NOW: PROTECT THE AMERICAN DREAM >>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=15fa85d5590b4f8c91c5bad458cb8195&_e=V1tqqWPZGc1HHxgVBth4F50Wpv0OGFkrWu-fxM-5dsbJ9VbydTV1QijBWzNQo2jnMFl8D9Q46ECa_XtQB05aAk5tT6jivKNuaVx3uXGdFwEAVziMTYsew3Yg5tmDv_vDAVF8zo1V-MZ1EPuPfp0vFE7Vx4RcrVj_Gq2RcWKN__-D1CnHxcbGUFcv3VpC17aCF4fZpp68BbYUZZAtza7YSMzJGSx06jncpM8cC8Dnty-xBgdsz6xkqD0a7vv-LN-xbs_fw6-oB7BRJNSpV9XWvFefyQuJTbIpyMr6P9IEfC0chLVgmS0gek-zK4AxIE06OQl7_aKzFNhthioBeDEpXi8mLwIzLt2Md6BzEG60ECGam5OAiHNqmyFrbgKYooLAW5pGEeEEIP_uD3mc1u5Pz_Q6HK6YjuSkR0VVsF9YBMGnLFzz9HnIkMcABWPyyn3OtGqWuAk-MZlETR4vHyVHbdem1a6Lqq4gRou4Q-F6lx0%3D) I’m so thankful to have been given the opportunity to share our positive and hopeful message with the American people. The very foundation of our country is at stake and we must work together to ensure that future generations have the opportunities to succeed—just like I did. _**Friend, will you join me in fighting for our shared values, for the country we love and to protect the American dream?**_ [**DONATE NOW: PROTECT THE AMERICAN DREAM >>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=15fa85d5590b4f8c91c5bad458cb8195&_e=V1tqqWPZGc1HHxgVBth4F50Wpv0OGFkrWu-fxM-5dsbJ9VbydTV1QijBWzNQo2jnMFl8D9Q46ECa_XtQB05aAk5tT6jivKNuaVx3uXGdFwEAVziMTYsew3Yg5tmDv_vDAVF8zo1V-MZ1EPuPfp0vFE7Vx4RcrVj_Gq2RcWKN__-D1CnHxcbGUFcv3VpC17aCF4fZpp68BbYUZZAtza7YSMzJGSx06jncpM8cC8Dnty-xBgdsz6xkqD0a7vv-LN-xbs_fw6-oB7BRJNSpV9XWvPRwN9Ekh8RyD_N71lSy593HMaJD7NsGblI9emgaiyIQseOToAp1ng6PJNi5Gr-FgxCOpl3m6bk4tamtVxKOXESav834C-M-k-1fATlRwmdnNiHIn2dAT8i_r0vEhNki9crtM8I7dl6DGPVWEJT9KNQV8aHeISRjpga3y_AZA4npSIWq6BisdBNy8B_fFE5dwKY5JZEcItkbbSKh-zQ1juM%3D) **The issues we are facing are about the promise of America.** It’s about the American people -- our challenges and heartbreaks, hopes and dreams. It’s about how we respond when tackling critical issues facing our country.**Friend, do we want a society that breeds success or one that cancels it?** This country has given so much to me and I want to ensure that future generations are given the same opportunities to succeed. There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream. **Join me in making sure that all families have a fair shot at the American Dream my family was blessed to achieve.** [**DONATE NOW: PROTECT THE AMERICAN DREAM >>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=15fa85d5590b4f8c91c5bad458cb8195&_e=V1tqqWPZGc1HHxgVBth4F50Wpv0OGFkrWu-fxM-5dsbJ9VbydTV1QijBWzNQo2jnMFl8D9Q46ECa_XtQB05aAk5tT6jivKNuaVx3uXGdFwEAVziMTYsew3Yg5tmDv_vDAVF8zo1V-MZ1EPuPfp0vFE7Vx4RcrVj_Gq2RcWKN__-D1CnHxcbGUFcv3VpC17aCF4fZpp68BbYUZZAtza7YSMzJGSx06jncpM8cC8Dnty-xBgdsz6xkqD0a7vv-LN-xbs_fw6-oB7BRJNSpV9XWvDVL3JEalzApGmGCwj3rl9--uVCjXPdd2osxCbzOPw1yidrirJTMPqq5bkjg2LlZzAno4T_ujUv9C_1kVJ9pioCdWxvjWWxXhriYZwqh1iJ0cLKx18EQeFIQqBtyjJumrM-HEQJD--TMQi5Hc3POJgzUB4Vv0jiz3gaPIE6aXC7SzlLxN5f10XN99A3Y7Qh1Pz0uTtr_2tD4zmWwwBb5CF8%3D) Thank you, [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=15fa85d5590b4f8c91c5bad458cb8195&_e=V1tqqWPZGc1HHxgVBth4F50Wpv0OGFkrWu-fxM-5dsbJ9VbydTV1QijBWzNQo2jnMFl8D9Q46ECa_XtQB05aAk5tT6jivKNuaVx3uXGdFwEAVziMTYsew3Yg5tmDv_vDAVF8zo1V-MZ1EPuPfp0vFE7Vx4RcrVj_Gq2RcWKN__-D1CnHxcbGUFcv3VpC17aCF4fZpp68BbYUZZAtza7YSMzJGSx06jncpM8cC8Dnty-xBgdsz6xkqD0a7vv-LN-xbs_fw6-oB7BRJNSpV9XWvLYRXVxCyoue1xMKE-jyEpjypSpNnT8xExhWo4MPzfmHUIUX1OmTTRPKGsijxZVCbk9hu5YLs_wTJ-vUiQRJ3Osu9LlHOrdoZn_EeCmYnWW_O7fE074HTCVH-0xpAv098OoPvggAF887-G3OIiJtwBcO6hw7nBVUHzn1bnhiwCaQ8r9XyiZgX7F0AgY42Frl5ov3DP8Jx0ED8gWwOXcFIhY%3D) Tim Scott |

**TL;DR:** Since he was first elected, Mike Garcia has proved that he’s only in politics for himself -- now, it’s time for him to go. [**Donate today to flip CA-25 back to blue >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28406706/283143081/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210429_eom3-s1b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGRjMGU5OS0xNmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoQaF4HaYXGCqt6inFP6fclqwOW_gbiCq50b7n4647o=)
Peter,

By now, you know that Mike is wrong for our district. We’ve emailed you many times about the many reasons he’s unfit to serve.

**But we keep emailing because the bad decisions keep piling up every week -- and we think it’s important that 25th District voters go into the midterms with all the facts.** [DONATE TO FLIP CA-25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28406707/283143082/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210429_eom3-s1b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGRjMGU5OS0xNmE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HoQaF4HaYXGCqt6inFP6fclqwOW_gbiCq50b7n4647o=) _He voted against sending communities their long awaited COVID-19 relief funds.

He voted against the Equality Act, which prohibits discrimination against our LGBTQ friends, family, and neighbors.

He voted against commonsense gun violence prevention measures that will help keep our people safe._

Our April fundraising deadline is tomorrow. With just 36 hours to go, we are still coming up short. Can you be one of the people we are relying on today to chip in to help us meet our goal? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28407939/283146683/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlMWQxMzJkLTFiYTktZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VrkK9q5_4XYFUv257M5tXIydD17EZZLmuiOm3TZKOGo=&emci=4cee3cb0-13a9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=be1d132d-1ba9-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131) Peter, It's Simona--Founder and Executive Director of Moms in Office. With your help, we were able to expand our efforts in 2021 and keep up the fight for policies that match the crisis we face in our country today. [**Peter, if you are able, can you be one of the 200 people we are counting on today to help us meet our goal in April?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28407942/283146686/-1644589594?refcode=0429&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlMWQxMzJkLTFiYTktZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VrkK9q5_4XYFUv257M5tXIydD17EZZLmuiOm3TZKOGo=) Nearly all of our fundraising comes from emails like this one. Thank you so much for your support. Have a great day! Simona Grace [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28407943/283146687/-1644589594?refcode=0429&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlMWQxMzJkLTFiYTktZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VrkK9q5_4XYFUv257M5tXIydD17EZZLmuiOm3TZKOGo=) Moms in Office

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Are we going to be short?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me
|
---
| | |
Friend,

**I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me.** His endorsement gave us a huge boost this month, but it energized the Democrats like you wouldn't believe.

We aren't sure we're going to make our goal, and I'll be honest, I noticed you haven't stepped up to donate towards our End of Month goal.

We only have _**[ONE day](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VHS203lS_51JLZCHB7ITs3S4zxsscsbX_lwA1X6C3jziZ5wmFOv7FQ3px4PSedDjzyYBaLYPLOTS_YPZSZNkJohEJtqQ3XDOyeAS7xBWkpFf-jhmI9DXuClzGDCuASdrmf-I5C09Z5L9nevPVSYSpdG28je-TcBrZ3LPkD8a14uRmhh86Li-a_lNvhAe5FHDzOUZDCx-woVwwgS28IgA-KC-omQkSTupxU-LDdEwGVj0b-8-1pfOZujAH9JFcgUMSysqN0kZ5u4hr9xprh5HijBAgjObT0EehvRMKBhSJ8M0tKm0iHxWHpEgmPr_2q9GtwxHp8o-fUQWJQ4CcUb_ScnzWe5SpuoQ6qtYF7XkdC3mgSWb5pyI9T8CbkLGnjJhQiqsyfB_NqZ7YAsA-1dJc3BvlYaExEyMk_GDqpM2gfI2aD6DJ_ECow==&c=cc-WMkmZSgEuO3XOm8boEsK2NJv-YVraqmK0Ea0lMhHH6lPpu8AZbA==&ch=pHf_M-Ll9Uj0hl897XGHhFcg8TqZcFdfZVMZ5rloFHSJje64vFdmhw== "ONE day ")**_ left. Don't let this moment pass you by, Friend.

We are working our absolute hardest to combat the attacks by the radical Left. These attacks have increased since we received President Trump's complete and total endorsement -- new attack ads are being launched every week, targeting me for having his support.

Frankly, I'm proud to have President Trump's support. But it puts a target on my race, and if I don't have the resources to stay in this fight... Well, I hope it won't get to that point with your help, Friend.

We CAN'T let it happen.

If you are going to stand with me and President Trump, can we count on you to chip in now? To ensure your donation has a **MASSIVE** impact on the campaign and show you how critical this goal is, I've unlocked **4x matching!**

**Now is the time to take a stand with me and President Trump, Friend. **

name: Tim Scott
subject: We need to fight for the soul of this nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
I mean what I said in my response to President Biden's first address to Congress. Every word. | |
---
Peter,
I mean what I said in my response to President Biden’s first address to Congress. _Every word._

**From cotton to Congress in one lifetime. That’s the story of my family and my American Dream. And that’s why I believe, with the right decisions, the next century can be better than the last.**
[**Donate Now >>> Protect the American Dream**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1120e121c95c411fb7a2ed2c73a9a86d&_e=IA0htkrsG8N93_jD4ppQ40I5J8S7L58TDTuBesseKcKLQkg8kR_UGxCh99Z6_Yzjxg0eXU8YPQ_6vMUjBPL3Ic0KT3HnHYHMcsjTV-L_pRnxcnHKWb9wooakmCJhEdF8GAe0GvxeXZ-olbnVz1dAI58v1WP6i-_apLxuiqN6S7MpnzOOi5zmLCN-VuvZELy3IYSRZ3rOa_5DOLF9o-d5k16Tc2uAk5ws2TyFRZVyM6Ibgrpe8OhohvBG8yHiCEAxCxMHYqI8CYDR8xcx3N4TPkO-_aw_5nNlel7XSgsuv3e7uufRhRm9wcaMw1Csq78NRsJ46KqOT24_knMH45ZGQrxJLwHJKTJ3NpNnE5TFNZSBaM6D3ZBihN_ExuRCe_WMXA1SZjwC3yh9CTfmUjQgCA%3D%3D)
I’m so thankful to have been given the opportunity to share our positive and hopeful message with the American people.

The very foundation of our country is at stake and we must work together to ensure that future generations have the opportunities to succeed — just like I did.

_**Peter, will you join me in fighting for our shared values, for the country we love and to protect the American dream?**_
[**Donate Now >>> Protect the American Dream**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1120e121c95c411fb7a2ed2c73a9a86d&_e=IA0htkrsG8N93_jD4ppQ40I5J8S7L58TDTuBesseKcKLQkg8kR_UGxCh99Z6_Yzjxg0eXU8YPQ_6vMUjBPL3Ic0KT3HnHYHMcsjTV-L_pRnxcnHKWb9wooakmCJhEdF8GAe0GvxeXZ-olbnVz1dAI58v1WP6i-_apLxuiqN6S7MpnzOOi5zmLCN-VuvZELy3oNXKZIPmVHMb01U5qjlzjmOtnO8RUICrzsOsGZlvRA_7NpgJKhOyALoEjP02bx_jvWwiLUi067a8YeZCr3eHW0qaSbqr13PNlqpqWstK2VBhwYFL_pljISeVjQzYRzummPXqin-x2j3Eqk2NqMNVsoXYBriKzRgtf47kdm-9-I2wIp4SqCId4TKoLlJ1b6OB2xsaao47_6UwIDUEQPrPlg%3D%3D)
**The issues we are facing are about the promise of America.**

It’s about the American people -- our challenges and heartbreaks, hopes and dreams. It’s about how we respond when tackling critical issues facing our country. **Peter, do we want a society that breeds success or one that cancels it?**

This country has given so much to me and I want to ensure that future generations are given the same opportunities to succeed.

There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream.

**Join me in making sure that all families have a fair shot at the American Dream my family was blessed to achieve.**

clean_body: I mean what I said in my response to President Biden's first address to Congress. Every word. | | Peter, I mean what I said in my response to President Biden’s first address to Congress. Every word. From cotton to Congress in one lifetime. That’s the story of my family and my American Dream. And that’s why I believe, with the right decisions, the next century can be better than the last. I’m so thankful to have been given the opportunity to share our positive and hopeful message with the American people. The very foundation of our country is at stake and we must work together to ensure that future generations have the opportunities to succeed — just like I did. Peter, will you join me in fighting for our shared values, for the country we love and to protect the American dream? The issues we are facing are about the promise of America. It’s about the American people -- our challenges and heartbreaks, hopes and dreams. It’s about how we respond when tackling critical issues facing our country. Peter, do we want a society that breeds success or one that cancels it? This country has given so much to me and I want to ensure that future generations are given the same opportunities to succeed. There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream. Join me in making sure that all families have a fair shot at the American Dream my family was blessed to achieve. Tim Scott | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Tim Scott
subject: Following up on my speech last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I was so honored to deliver the official Republican Address to the Nation the other night and present a clear conservative contrast with the failed liberal policies of President Biden.

Democrats are busy moving us toward socialism and denouncing America's history and values, Republicans are focused on expanding economic opportunity to kickstart our recovery from last year.

But _**we cannot stop the Democrats ' radical transformation of our country and get Americans back to work without your help.**_

[**Will you pitch in a donation of $100, $50, $25 or any amount you can to fight for America and stop the radical Democrats?**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/tim-scott-speech-ns/?sc=pem51002m13m&utm_campaign=20210429_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1060509-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210429_following-up-on-my-speech-last-night)
****[DONATE NOW](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/tim-scott-speech-ns/?sc=pem51002m13m&utm_campaign=20210429_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1060509-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210429_following-up-on-my-speech-last-night)****
---

In his speech, Joe Biden laid out a dangerous agenda that fundamentally transforms America. _He 's calling for higher taxes, open borders, gun control, the Green New Deal and to roll back our Constitutional freedoms._

As I write this email, Joe Biden and his allies are raising MILLIONS of dollars from Hollywood liberals and radical activists to attack our conservative values.

I need you to stand with me and keep fighting for the future of our country. We can't give in and lose years of progress on tax cuts, judges, and economic opportunity reform, let alone our precious rights and freedoms.

[**Will you chip in to defend our conservative values and stop Joe Biden 's socialist agenda?**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/tim-scott-speech-ns/?sc=pem51002m13m&utm_campaign=20210429_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1060509-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210429_following-up-on-my-speech-last-night)

Thank you for your support,

Senator Tim Scott

name: Tim Scott
subject: My American Story: from cotton to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I meant what I said in my response to President Biden's first address to Congress. Every word.

I meant what I said in my response to President Biden's first address to Congress. _Every word._

**From cotton to Congress in one lifetime. That 's the story of my family and my American Dream. And that's why I believe, with the right decisions, the next century can be better than the last.**
_****_
****[DONATE NOW>>>Protect the American Dream](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YbcFfSfwx4gu1v2EII4JVgnR7YOrKvuhs5JlA3EwpGqggvHmJ1ByR5572JAlezB87QX0osEbZ5sn-fV2hrF2tX5tcgZBeSXGs57nQAB6n8wUF-d2LoOvTDmqoZivOfnlrfi0msjYxAsWB0PoTG9ihVSNRl6REeSZ0oX3dWHnhFF7HSnhg3ng6Qzmy4pNNTZII8hoQi_TRJ04kyQSV_IqSg7u3e3ErzMckAN1P_2HNey492z4vt_YozXyoSozsirstsEIxVcR0D3apjcUne9NBeKjrgfV7MFffKnp6TZvfAjGwnDPVhwBcSJDSUDmuZAJUeumbWZY8mUr4W87imyyZOAEGfYvmrL8-9M1XFRPcRLN051N0JP9LBzPOHjuwurtgDEJHPAJOJ_wnT5SjHj2YwkawLwkTMmafZNhePoo8WRVTrbgDpLy5aB-LXl6NOtO&c=zztT125n_DVFJhwFyLceQm3ZXXuq47PjyLPt1wp0fbgO94UPx5IwQQ==&ch=pZpOd6YMGtZ_ET-QcyAyT2CRgXJ-B9rJMMVucqYaGaWG6Ljb4V53SQ==)****
---

I'm so thankful to have been given the opportunity to share our positive and hopeful message with the American people.

The very foundation of our country is at stake and we must work together to ensure that future generations have the opportunities to succeed--just like I did.

**Will you join me in fighting for our shared values, for the country we love and to protect the American dream?******

**[**DONATE NOW >>>Protect the American Dream**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YbcFfSfwx4gu1v2EII4JVgnR7YOrKvuhs5JlA3EwpGqggvHmJ1ByR5572JAlezB87QX0osEbZ5sn-fV2hrF2tX5tcgZBeSXGs57nQAB6n8wUF-d2LoOvTDmqoZivOfnlrfi0msjYxAsWB0PoTG9ihVSNRl6REeSZ0oX3dWHnhFF7HSnhg3ng6Qzmy4pNNTZII8hoQi_TRJ04kyQSV_IqSg7u3e3ErzMckAN1P_2HNey492z4vt_YozXyoSozsirstsEIxVcR0D3apjcUne9NBeKjrgfV7MFffKnp6TZvfAjGwnDPVhwBcSJDSUDmuZAJUeumbWZY8mUr4W87imyyZOAEGfYvmrL8-9M1XFRPcRLN051N0JP9LBzPOHjuwurtgDEJHPAJOJ_wnT5SjHj2YwkawLwkTMmafZNhePoo8WRVTrbgDpLy5aB-LXl6NOtO&c=zztT125n_DVFJhwFyLceQm3ZXXuq47PjyLPt1wp0fbgO94UPx5IwQQ==&ch=pZpOd6YMGtZ_ET-QcyAyT2CRgXJ-B9rJMMVucqYaGaWG6Ljb4V53SQ==)**
---

**The issues we are facing are about the promise of America.**

It's about the American people--our challenges and heartbreaks, hopes and dreams. It's about how we respond when tackling critical issues facing our country. **Do we want a society that breeds success or one that cancels it?**

This country has given so much to me and I want to ensure that future generations are given the same opportunities to succeed.

There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream.

**Join me in making sure that all families have a fair shot at the American Dream my family was blessed to achieve.**

**[**DONATE NOW >>>Protect the American Dream**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YbcFfSfwx4gu1v2EII4JVgnR7YOrKvuhs5JlA3EwpGqggvHmJ1ByR5572JAlezB87QX0osEbZ5sn-fV2hrF2tX5tcgZBeSXGs57nQAB6n8wUF-d2LoOvTDmqoZivOfnlrfi0msjYxAsWB0PoTG9ihVSNRl6REeSZ0oX3dWHnhFF7HSnhg3ng6Qzmy4pNNTZII8hoQi_TRJ04kyQSV_IqSg7u3e3ErzMckAN1P_2HNey492z4vt_YozXyoSozsirstsEIxVcR0D3apjcUne9NBeKjrgfV7MFffKnp6TZvfAjGwnDPVhwBcSJDSUDmuZAJUeumbWZY8mUr4W87imyyZOAEGfYvmrL8-9M1XFRPcRLN051N0JP9LBzPOHjuwurtgDEJHPAJOJ_wnT5SjHj2YwkawLwkTMmafZNhePoo8WRVTrbgDpLy5aB-LXl6NOtO&c=zztT125n_DVFJhwFyLceQm3ZXXuq47PjyLPt1wp0fbgO94UPx5IwQQ==&ch=pZpOd6YMGtZ_ET-QcyAyT2CRgXJ-B9rJMMVucqYaGaWG6Ljb4V53SQ==)**
---

Tim Scott

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I’m in disbelief:

Fox News just admitted Republicans are FLEEING the Senate.

-- Ohio’s Senator called it quits.
-- Pennsylvania’s Senator is out.
-- North Carolina’s Senator is retiring.
-- Alabama’s Senator is stepping down.
-- Now, Missouri’s Senator is leaving, too.

I cannot emphasize this enough:

This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to build the biggest Democratic Senate in history -- and END McConnell for good. But I still need 10,000 gifts to hit my Midnight goal and OUTRAISE McConnell. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: critically important (let me explain)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
In a moment, I'll ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign. It may seem early, but I hope you'll allow me to explain why your support _now_ matters so much.
New Hampshire is a notorious battleground state. In 2016, dark money and Republican special interest groups poured in millions of dollars to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. When the dust settled,**I won by just 1,017 votes.**
Now, with Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to win this seat. Strong early fundraising allows us to lock in -- and fund -- our strategy to fend off GOP attacks. But with New Hampshire's expensive media markets and polls showing us down, **we need to build up our fundraising ASAP.**
Our April fundraising deadline is tomorrow and we're very close to our goal. $3 from you could get us over the top, so I have to ask: [**Will you please give $3 or more right now to protect New Hampshire 's vulnerable Senate seat and our Democratic majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc82b/2a380d31/265a816b/f00ed5/3687739978/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyOV9lYXJseV9ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210429_early_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Greg Abbott
subject: This is incredibly important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
| | Friend,

As the Governor of Texas and the former Attorney General, I know firsthand how important election integrity is to our democracy.

Unfortunately, during the 2020 election, we witnessed actions in some counties that could threaten the integrity of our elections and enable voter fraud in Texas.

And that is simply unacceptable.

Friend, we should be doing EVERYTHING in our power to ensure that only those who are LEGALLY able to vote are ACTUALLY casting ballots. Additionally, we must make sure that any eligible voter is actually given the opportunity to vote.

There is so much work to be done in order to ensure election integrity, **_[and I want to make sure that I have your support in this fight.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XLgmBEsurbP622V604JQJSVMlH2ntBKlJjOY0wE2VmHiKSL_hKwcYw6idyRa9bDwdvujZYLpfbmPk7wrhi7tDuPjrf2P3M2QmTjDQ6LlL__5llPRSk34kd2YNeEeF-nO_iL_m-doHoa18lIjWC2czg8d2slH2yZapr-L4qefW33RNOmN0gJurvSdl_fheBxJUGcV_Km4i50QckkCca-ZkAUIFgVjgG9ZpQvD5ZDfIGjhlJuncm2Rk-imz4jkgSVzMapqXrhZtdlE2YQbg3bbzWw4aOZrarrRzR0QFtL1glvPsqnfIM5H_2b-HUHYYIzySrFfzUI1dyW83-VOpRoKQx3flayYgMl648q3h6II-J7zMNVM5tG-fQN8vp0azusbsfG7aDHaOFU=&c=TYMwzrbEnnEIVGbIfm2BcvUICXtyVc4Lv_7aT_DEms1iWA5ta8oHXg==&ch=7JA0JQS9O_I3Ummo_KIQC4OVwI9JCyz9hXIqng2TmBhcRwkc5C2kAw== "and I want to make sure that I have your support in this fight.")_** **[STAND UP FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XLgmBEsurbP622V604JQJSVMlH2ntBKlJjOY0wE2VmHiKSL_hKwcYw6idyRa9bDwdvujZYLpfbmPk7wrhi7tDuPjrf2P3M2QmTjDQ6LlL__5llPRSk34kd2YNeEeF-nO_iL_m-doHoa18lIjWC2czg8d2slH2yZapr-L4qefW33RNOmN0gJurvSdl_fheBxJUGcV_Km4i50QckkCca-ZkAUIFgVjgG9ZpQvD5ZDfIGjhlJuncm2Rk-imz4jkgSVzMapqXrhZtdlE2YQbg3bbzWw4aOZrarrRzR0QFtL1glvPsqnfIM5H_2b-HUHYYIzySrFfzUI1dyW83-VOpRoKQx3flayYgMl648q3h6II-J7zMNVM5tG-fQN8vp0azusbsfG7aDHaOFU=&c=TYMwzrbEnnEIVGbIfm2BcvUICXtyVc4Lv_7aT_DEms1iWA5ta8oHXg==&ch=7JA0JQS9O_I3Ummo_KIQC4OVwI9JCyz9hXIqng2TmBhcRwkc5C2kAw== "STAND UP FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY")**

Peter,

Let me be the first one to officially welcome you to Team Earls!

**I’m honored to have your support on this journey.**

If you’ve read my book or been following my family’s vlog, you may already be familiar with my story. If you are just getting to know me, I made a quick video to introduce myself and explain what made me decide to run for Congress.

Check it out:
|

[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=ceb29261e73f4480aca6a52c5f3fb483&_e=b6MzwNE_uFJ9qEbY7hpVVVxe5_DOX3Vgd2okwg85vkRljw1ywSakHleU-SHtwhuZkcepwng1YzazwsUey7gP4jNpORyhRlmsWU2PMOdzCsXO5s8VeFI_1dZ4wMsN5QoAGvji52t9ivRvZjkxQQ2ySvgtWcpv3gFIDzMCoyDeLD6vZ0GxoIBlPN4qW9pmYh4ZumCbNIn-w1AmF1DLNqLmgq-GOj-QqwDyWwu9N9XZT1Xu8S1fWKiPS_sfdWWuP94aK6QjJm7HIUzDMS-HeAVAX_FsEQPeveowZHQKhfCJU4SI0xHghx8lSp2y6uK7yCqNTOnTM0VnOBf6zqJSkelZg9aMZjQlB3zVdWRoTsv9MRg0OiO6rE6e9fDfgKnMgwF3iahvPxp3AHwJYlYWbn7ygzJc-JTu-zzVZ605rVUYBZEJSGIxzTWAWmBwrGviTjygwnuGpDSlim08Nk0_01SzsrYRZBsrW4suqwkp5ZpNNS5X8RT6Z3jHAGtxsd23QoXg)
|
---
Nothing will compare to the anger I felt as I stood watch over our nation’s most hallowed ground while, just across the Potomac, politicians were defacing the very values the heroes I guarded died defending.

Less than three miles from where I stood in Arlington National Cemetery, bureaucrats who will never know the true cost of freedom applauded athletes who knelt during the national anthem and rioters who burned flags in the street.

My blood was boiling. I knew I couldn’t just sit back and watch it happen, so I made the decision to run for office and change things from the inside out.

I don’t just want to win on Election Day, I want to start a movement. But I’m going to be really honest with you, Peter - it’s going to be tough. **I’ll need your support every single step of the way, starting right now.**

**Will you[chip in $25](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=ceb29261e73f4480aca6a52c5f3fb483&_e=b6MzwNE_uFJ9qEbY7hpVVVxe5_DOX3Vgd2okwg85vkRljw1ywSakHleU-SHtwhuZkcepwng1YzazwsUey7gP4kqAc2jNQLcEnc9yOVmUM-7wNRUgrsmtsDLXlmIGd3GFwJK3YTSkctSyrZyBPpYCRBGAcisyr-mWIrVsUop0A-WeOsNY7XzJXLBMEmwB0_uKFgw0zBNl-LmFCy1nrLmSOrM5NhJPMmxW4zKXTcz7amCzcyvTeOyqNNj8ECqVA3OKXAEhtNPeREW_Y5anqaJLfhcxXoYJ9YpOwywl9aMLPT5virc4Enm5lqrWLuFmWYO8AxkAR-7DTJ8iG2ed5SnBMCj3Fggl2zxoWWoMNKM1E-gArIrsdVg2L9bn_gLIh_vnXhGaByyTlw9CBNmtYmKRBqs28Mss_mPHOxSRebE8Ov3noML1aswmoPtuZTv_kKODWY6VXnVU-rT3LRqv7X1Ytf5Z3d6oZZAVU79dRAb6rPsRYCdFbmX_a9kax-tamXQR) to become a Team Earls founding donor and help me hit the ground running?**
|

Harold

Friend, I was so honored to deliver the official Republican Address to the Nation last night and present a clear conservative contrast with the failed liberal policies of President Biden. Democrats are busy moving us toward socialism and denouncing America's history and values. Republicans are focused on expanding economic opportunity to kickstart our recovery from last year. But Friend, _**we cannot stop the Democrats ' radical transformation of our country and get Americans back to work without your help. **_ [**Will you pitch in a donation of $100, $50, $25 or any amount you can to fight for America and stop the radical Democrats?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xH7Opdh976h6hUDVw78Megvvz5v9G-ady6qeeCBQlSJ7GSq9wO-Ruzsy1huQe3fpyDQ6HZudxY4q9My6VIOJfO18wBViHN75wQ6qgORMS8_Ba-pAUyfzU3Se4cNoZDvg7JczOLwoZaHoFpmJwnIOYLHvgKofcy4xq7RYnInJlmNVbgD0Pq_lL8s5BSaSLYcxBqQSK8lBgtHA1hAjFJ-OqJGydqfYsjWbbJEfIlY3sc0ASu2d-hYwTLfLTLlPrLXZGJPkLzjtrnMr4dNbCb4PnMQn3bk296ZxERvpruRRRRiFeDc3ALUufxq_flRzMC9enw4mTI8vwCq3xRY-1zk7E8UTngwxucbjpAY_QVQsRDDuZEPx-8qoasuYE-1WrU0oUMXriVuWrA_fZfK-xP83ngmq_Wg7VXaoTMxMLKK92p5WCOKyjnB9trZQI5AhQOAArrO4akDPN9TDrJnWulrGrvpm1fz7IHNfi_W4pGnFKsE=&c=3pRg8SC4CEQ5AR2oUaPPd9zFdug4491lY2m-k-9FIm-Su2pYSbAc6w==&ch=lr8IHi90p5ZUCyDsTt6ZjlBMDojkrOza72r-2qY7ero05jPXDM-F1Q==) [DONATE NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xH7Opdh976h6hUDVw78Megvvz5v9G-ady6qeeCBQlSJ7GSq9wO-Ruzsy1huQe3fpyDQ6HZudxY4q9My6VIOJfO18wBViHN75wQ6qgORMS8_Ba-pAUyfzU3Se4cNoZDvg7JczOLwoZaHoFpmJwnIOYLHvgKofcy4xq7RYnInJlmNVbgD0Pq_lL8s5BSaSLYcxBqQSK8lBgtHA1hAjFJ-OqJGydqfYsjWbbJEfIlY3sc0ASu2d-hYwTLfLTLlPrLXZGJPkLzjtrnMr4dNbCb4PnMQn3bk296ZxERvpruRRRRiFeDc3ALUufxq_flRzMC9enw4mTI8vwCq3xRY-1zk7E8UTngwxucbjpAY_QVQsRDDuZEPx-8qoasuYE-1WrU0oUMXriVuWrA_fZfK-xP83ngmq_Wg7VXaoTMxMLKK92p5WCOKyjnB9trZQI5AhQOAArrO4akDPN9TDrJnWulrGrvpm1fz7IHNfi_W4pGnFKsE=&c=3pRg8SC4CEQ5AR2oUaPPd9zFdug4491lY2m-k-9FIm-Su2pYSbAc6w==&ch=lr8IHi90p5ZUCyDsTt6ZjlBMDojkrOza72r-2qY7ero05jPXDM-F1Q==) In his speech, Joe Biden laid out a dangerous agenda that fundamentally transforms America. _He 's calling for higher taxes, open borders, gun control, the Green New Deal and to roll back our Constitutional freedoms. _ As I write this email, Joe Biden and his allies are raising MILLIONS of dollars from Hollywood liberals and radical activists to attack our conservative values. body:
Peter,

The veterans of Taking the Hill are proud to launch our 2022 US Senate slate with a big, virtual rally celebrating our [first endorsement of the cycle: **Senator Tammy Duckworth!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmSQb5e9Sjxi3YpTKA1HYqfaFHLmSY8B0fqD06Qu8Gw=/ugusvgbW2DXhuh6A3ZTlxg10k3rw_77EpnXJqxtsTeY=)

Last night's presidential address to Congress showed just how important our work is to elect a majority of integrity in the US Senate. With Senators like Ted Cruz and Lindsey Graham falling asleep while President Biden talked about cutting childhood poverty and fighting for working-class jobs, we desperately need a Senate that can meet this moment of national urgency. Senator Duckworth is making history every day and leading by example on the Senate floor - we need more Senators like her!

We are counting on friends like you to help us fight back against the big money that funds the wrong kind of people in government. [_**We need to raise at least $20,000 at our rally to stay on track! **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmSQb5e9Sjxi3YpTKA1HYqfaFHLmSY8B0fqD06Qu8Gw=/ugusvgbW2DXhuh6A3ZTlxg10k3rw_77EpnXJqxtsTeY=)_**[Will you purchase a ticket or become an event sponsor to s](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmSQb5e9Sjxi3YpTKA1HYqfaFHLmSY8B0fqD06Qu8Gw=/ugusvgbW2DXhuh6A3ZTlxg10k3rw_77EpnXJqxtsTeY=)**_[ _**how Tammy Duckworth that we 've got her back?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmSQb5e9Sjxi3YpTKA1HYqfaFHLmSY8B0fqD06Qu8Gw=/ugusvgbW2DXhuh6A3ZTlxg10k3rw_77EpnXJqxtsTeY=)

[**Date: Tuesday, May 18th
Time: 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm Eastern
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmSQb5e9Sjxi3YpTKA1HYqfaFHLmSY8B0fqD06Qu8Gw=/ugusvgbW2DXhuh6A3ZTlxg10k3rw_77EpnXJqxtsTeY=)

Let's show up for Senator Duckworth and WIN the Senate!

In solidarity,

_**Team [Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmSQb5e9Sjxi3YpTKA1HYqfaFHLmSY8B0fqD06Qu8Gw=/nwMhMrLntCnMPD8QRr5roH2po1oC593iIaQ45OQvnrs=)**_

name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hi, there — it’s Lily, Mark’s finance director.
I wanted to reach out with a quick update because tomorrow is our April fundraising deadline — a critical deadline for us and this campaign.
Our goal is to get 35,000 donations before the deadline expires and the good news is we’re over 88% of the way to that goal — so all we need to do is finish strong!
So in order to counter this avalanche of outside spending, we are going to fight back one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.
Unlike our opponents who rely on blank checks from Super PACs, our goal is based on the number of people donating and not a dollar amount because this campaign is funded by people — people like you.
So it’s important that we hit this goal because everyone is going to be looking to see if we have the resources to compete with the millions in outside spending.
**You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation before our April fundraising deadline? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 35,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?refcode=em210429-1-15&t=1&refcode2=531_6688874_P3SeaG&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210429-1-15&t=2&refcode2=531_6688874_P3SeaG&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210429-1-15&t=3&refcode2=531_6688874_P3SeaG&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210429-1-15&t=4&refcode2=531_6688874_P3SeaG&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210429-1-15&t=5&refcode2=531_6688874_P3SeaG&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210429-1-15&t=6&refcode2=531_6688874_P3SeaG&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210429-1-15&t=7&refcode2=531_6688874_P3SeaG&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG)
---|---
We are proud of the way we fund this campaign. A campaign funded by people, for the people, will always be stronger than the Super PACs who want to defeat us.
So just know that any amount you can give will go a long way. Thank you in advance for chipping in and for having Mark’s back.
All my best,
Lily Ross
Finance Director
Mark Kelly for Senate

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=531%2E6688874%2EP3SeaG).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Hi, there — it’s Lily, Mark’s finance director. I wanted to reach out with a quick update because tomorrow is our April fundraising deadline — a critical deadline for us and this campaign. Our goal is to get 35,000 donations before the deadline expires and the good news is we’re over 88% of the way to that goal — so all we need to do is finish strong! So in order to counter this avalanche of outside spending, we are going to fight back one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate. Unlike our opponents who rely on blank checks from Super PACs, our goal is based on the number of people donating and not a dollar amount because this campaign is funded by people — people like you. So it’s important that we hit this goal because everyone is going to be looking to see if we have the resources to compete with the millions in outside spending. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- We are proud of the way we fund this campaign. A campaign funded by people, for the people, will always be stronger than the Super PACs who want to defeat us. So just know that any amount you can give will go a long way. Thank you in advance for chipping in and for having Mark’s back. All my best, Lily Ross Finance Director Mark Kelly for Senate Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

Friend,

Last week our state legislative session went into recess and I want to let you know how excited I am for Indiana’s next chapter.

This past year was one of the most challenging years we’ve ever faced. But I can say with full confidence that Indiana’s future is bright –– and the balanced, historic, bipartisan budget we just passed makes our future **even brighter.**

While other states are tightening their belts and cutting budgets, we’re investing in communities, students, teachers, law enforcement, and Hoosiers like never before. It’s incredible, and it’s all happening for one simple reason:

**Responsible, conservative fiscal management.**

Because of the Hoosier Spirit that drives us, we’ve weathered the economic storm of COVID-19 and we’re firing on all cylinders once again –– beating expectations at every turn.

Below, I’ll break down the impacts that this balanced budget will have on education, economic development, and my Next Level Agenda. _**[Don’t forget to take the survey at the end to let me know what you’re most excited about!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7718de1be0cd404780515c49c1f3ace9&_e=JHk1ZcSMOpb7krq7Up5RhN-pQSFrnYPbYd1iXuoBYSSXl21-OaOtRQUqbStiAZDyTyfonvKybexfNQzM2eB2G7ChkRV2plxmDw6-iGHonJvpfsgJJbn19NN_rkm36RDLOaTxDgvTsc6vAbXXnhS_JyC6u1DXeTQagLx8SwYYalUt5kAPLe2uCKj7Gspgoeu8ssVvVlBpJsXoH5h2o3IEuDG0xF1fel89a7KPXu-gkif6gNh_Sk_9hl8QbZG7xJEsD-XK2_9suCpI27z_dmemSsSahm723fkJ4GhRQ09nyYDLhuxEAXI3sm36KJn7TzLxjCP_ny_o_NQOd2nPPC0zwWn_cCd04dQxTEZ5QFiKYlPW0Y_eyuxCSmNeCMJ7hSfmB2gO8FPPMyN4sThER-D5XYmaBSjEM0K6MXVIRCikj-uSdtxU5M4YJNII6c8Xr3s9N1PxanVTFJNfo_0fhm9Je0vWrXmog6juMrr84GTQcG0%3D)**_

_****ED** UCATION**_

Unprecedented investments in Hoosier education are on the horizon with more than 50% of the budget’s general fund dedicated to K-12 education, which allows us to:
* Invest $1.9 billion in NEW money for K-12 education.
* Invest $1.03 billion in NEW money for K-12 tuition support.
* Expand the nation’s best school choice program.
* Increase teacher compensation

_**ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT**_

Indiana’s workforce saw a **record number of job commitments** last year despite the uncertainty of the pandemic. Under this budget, we’re working to break that record again by:
* Investing an additional $60 million in small business relief.
* Investing $500 million in the new Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative to spur regional cooperation.
* Investing $10 million to help Hoosier manufacturers invest in new equipment and technologies.

_**MORE NEXT LEVEL AGENDA WINS**_

Thanks to the incredible cooperation of both parties in both houses, we were able to pass a number of transformational items from my Next Level Agenda, including:__
* COVID liability protections for schools and businesses.
* Comprehensive law enforcement reform that provides body cameras for officers and reviews training protocols.
* Expanded broadband development.
* Pregnancy accommodations for expecting mothers in the workplace.
* Keeping telehealth services permanent making life easier for Hoosier patients and healthcare providers.

Friend, what we were able to accomplish in this legislative session is nothing short of amazing –– and I applaud all who worked together to make sure that Indiana will continue moving in the right direction for years to come.

**[Before you go, will you take our quick one-minute survey to let me know what part of the budget you’re most excited about?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7718de1be0cd404780515c49c1f3ace9&_e=JHk1ZcSMOpb7krq7Up5RhN-pQSFrnYPbYd1iXuoBYSSXl21-OaOtRQUqbStiAZDyTyfonvKybexfNQzM2eB2G7ChkRV2plxmDw6-iGHonJvpfsgJJbn19NN_rkm36RDLOaTxDgvTsc6vAbXXnhS_JyC6u1DXeTQagLx8SwYYalUt5kAPLe2uCKj7Gspgoeu8ssVvVlBpJsXoH5h2o3IEuDG0xF1fel89a7KPXu-gkif6gNh_Sk_9hl8QbZG7xJEsD-XK2_9suCpI27z_dmemSkHYTsHqg1F8HkssgAA0uMJIxB1dIJWujEqxF6spGdSdNpCxtMdCEur2ytR86g7FyrMDCj35Oo4LUZvKbVh1SE0SuvVNeKiu_PZT4-wrDOACZZ60RwuulCEkmios64w24rK--jxTjQt-kgDgxdinh3xrNoTY31yAmRkS8NU2JP77hKKyPQEHveXUTAu4M9iH_vKJQpB8DWhQXelenSmlZxA%3D)**
[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7718de1be0cd404780515c49c1f3ace9&_e=JHk1ZcSMOpb7krq7Up5RhN-pQSFrnYPbYd1iXuoBYSSXl21-OaOtRQUqbStiAZDyTyfonvKybexfNQzM2eB2G7ChkRV2plxmDw6-iGHonJvpfsgJJbn19NN_rkm36RDLOaTxDgvTsc6vAbXXnhS_JyC6u1DXeTQagLx8SwYYalUt5kAPLe2uCKj7Gspgoeu8ssVvVlBpJsXoH5h2o3IEuDG0xF1fel89a7KPXu-gkif6gNh_Sk_9hl8QbZG7xJEsD-XK2_9suCpI27z_dmemSv298qmaECL_3xgAzm56wAiQh99BqdEbQ5EnWZq732hY_o4OItNCcPU_MFpBG_xQCJaDq8uzLBUY8HfHmoNUspgJEm3iqmEZq4x0mFSuLj6XywUQTR_qR4A2Lsdug-oaupPAM36NBdeLeZkAYfa-OzQcb3A32GAG_-UnLwWBsRT5HA0X3rmm8WJ-HWbd9g-lUVZQ39yCJ60GtXMU6zDxuD8%3D)
Thank you,
Eric Holcomb

name: Tim Scott
subject: A message to my proud mother, Frances Scott
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,
Growing up, I never imagined I would be delivering an address to the nation following the President of the United States.

_Incredible._

I will be honest, I am here because my mom has prayed me through some very tough times.

With her guidance and the help of a mentor, I was able to attend college, start a business, and run for public office.

Sadly, too many kids like me are being left behind and that is why I am so passionate about protecting the American Dream.
[Save the American Dream](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/my-mothers-american-dream/?utm_campaign=20210429_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1060707-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210429_a-message-to-my-proud-mother-frances-scott/)
---

My parents divorced when I was 7 years old. For a while, we moved into a two-bedroom house with my grandparents -- me, my mom, and my brother sharing a bed.

My mom worked 16 hours a day to keep food on our table and a roof over our heads. She knew that if we could just find the opportunity, bigger things would come for my brother and me.

I was convinced I had to use football to succeed in life. I nearly flunked the ninth grade as my focus on academics faded away. But my mother never lost faith in me, even when I had lost faith in myself.
[Save the American Dream](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/my-mothers-american-dream/?utm_campaign=20210429_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1060707-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210429_a-message-to-my-proud-mother-frances-scott/)
---

clean_body: Friend, Growing up, I never imagined I would be delivering an address to the nation following the President of the United States. Incredible. I will be honest, I am here because my mom has prayed me through some very tough times. With her guidance and the help of a mentor, I was able to attend college, start a business, and run for public office. Sadly, too many kids like me are being left behind and that is why I am so passionate about protecting the American Dream. My parents divorced when I was 7 years old. For a while, we moved into a two-bedroom house with my grandparents -- me, my mom, and my brother sharing a bed. My mom worked 16 hours a day to keep food on our table and a roof over our heads. She knew that if we could just find the opportunity, bigger things would come for my brother and me. I was convinced I had to use football to succeed in life. I nearly flunked the ninth grade as my focus on academics faded away. But my mother never lost faith in me, even when I had lost faith in myself. Friend, I want you to know the policies of the Democrat Party and Joe Biden are more than just words. They would prevent families like mine from reaching their American Dream. Please join me in fighting to protect the American Dream. Future generations are counting on patriots like you to step up and defend the conservative values that have made this country the greatest the world has ever seen. Frances Scott's proud son, Tim P.S. - Thank you, Mom. I wouldn't be where I am today without you! Hello, Yesterday I led my Senate colleagues in rolling back Trump’s Methane deregulation and reinstating Obama-era limits. _The Washington Post_ called it the most significant step we could take to address climate change, and the science agrees. Methane emissions have caused a quarter of the global warming we’ve seen since 1850, and it does over 80 times as much damage as carbon dioxide. Our action yesterday was commonsense, but took tremendous effort. **You are the reason I was able to put that work in. ** Our campaign is about more than just re-electing me to the U.S. Senate. When I’m in the Senate, I can lead efforts like reviving methane rules while also supporting local leaders in New Mexico, championing policies that will help working families in our state and across the country, investing in voter outreach ahead of important elections, and more. This campaign is about building a grassroots coalition that can take on tough battles and win — from the Senate floor to every corner of New Mexico. **What you may not know is that emails like this one are a big part of what makes our work possible.** We rely on grassroots donations of $10, $25, or even $5 at a time to keep the lights on, fund our work for New Mexico, and make sure I can stay focused on the job at hand. So when our Democratic majority allows us to win tough fights — like passing COVID-19 relief, investing in jobs and infrastructure, regulating methane emissions, and more — know that your support makes it all possible. **We’ve made a lot of progress together, but our work is far from over. Will you make a donation of any amount before tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to help us build on our wins in the months and years ahead?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28415257/283173995/-93376896?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=210429-eom-mh&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4NWFlMC0yZWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJFPYq_Lwm4oTYH8KL5iAcuaWLazqjNPjy4jKLalapY=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28415258/283173996/-93376896?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=210429-eom-mh&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4NWFlMC0yZWE5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJFPYq_Lwm4oTYH8KL5iAcuaWLazqjNPjy4jKLalapY=)

The Washington Post called it the most significant step we could take to address climate change, and the science agrees. Methane emissions have caused a quarter of the global warming we’ve seen since 1850, and it does over 80 times as much damage as carbon dioxide. Our action yesterday was commonsense, but took tremendous effort. You are the reason I was able to put that work in. Our campaign is about more than just re-electing me to the U.S. Senate. When I’m in the Senate, I can lead efforts like reviving methane rules while also supporting local leaders in New Mexico, championing policies that will help working families in our state and across the country, investing in voter outreach ahead of important elections, and more. This campaign is about building a grassroots coalition that can take on tough battles and win — from the Senate floor to every corner of New Mexico. What you may not know is that emails like this one are a big part of what makes our work possible. We rely on grassroots donations of $10, $25, or even $5 at a time to keep the lights on, fund our work for New Mexico, and make sure I can stay focused on the job at hand. So when our Democratic majority allows us to win tough fights — like passing COVID-19 relief, investing in jobs and infrastructure, regulating methane emissions, and more — know that your support makes it all possible. We’ve made a lot of progress together, but our work is far from over. Will you make a donation of any amount before tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to help us build on our wins in the months and years ahead? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support. It means so much to me to have you on this team. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, BREAKING NEWS: Last night Joe Biden took the stage and addressed both houses of Congress. Here's what we now know: With Joe Biden and his socialist followers like Nancy Pelosi, what you see is NOT what you get. We simply cannot trust their remarks. It's our job to hold Joe Biden accountable and to tell the truth to every single American. Here's how Biden and individuals like Nancy Pelosi have FAILED US -- ❌ Refusal to work with Republicans on any major piece of legislation ❌ $1.9 trillion spending bill that is a never ending socialist wishlist ❌ Forcing hard working Americans and middle class families to pay higher taxes ❌ Zero COVID conference call participation while Republican leaders like Mike Pence and Donald Trump did numerous ❌ Appointing a commission to study packing the court The facts are the facts. Joe Biden has completely TRASHED the American economy, and the American people don’t have his back, no matter what the Fake News media says. His new big-spending plan, The American Families Plan, will put us another trillion dollars into debt, and instead of helping working families, would make them more dependent on the government than ever before. If you care at all about taking a stand against Joe Biden before it’s too late, you need to pitch in to stop him. I’ve said this before and I’ll say it again: we should reopen the economy now and let Americans work, get kids back to school, stop the Chinese from undermining our economy and end the border crisis. Joe Biden does NOT have America’s true priorities at heart. clean_body: Last night, Tim Scott presented a different outlook for our future. The GOP agenda focuses on preserving the American dream by rewarding hard work and individualism Last night, Joe Biden pitched his next MULTI-TRILLION dollar spending plan which would bring his Administration's spending to OVER $6 TRILLION this year alone! It's crystal clear that Democrats want to upend our economic system and make Americans dependent on the government. It 's the SOCIALIST takeover we warned you about. Senator Tim Scott presented a VERY different outlook for our future. The GOP agenda focuses on PRESERVING the American dream by REWARDING hard work and individualism. == == The American people don't need bureaucrats in Washington telling them how to live their lives. If Biden and the Democrats get their way, YOUR hard earned money will be used to fund their radical policies! == | == == == The Left has given up on the American dream. body:
It’s official: Ted Budd joined the race for the U.S. Senate.
#
**Real quick:** **Republican Congressman Ted Budd announced that he’s officially entering the race for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina.**
Ted Budd voted against a $15 minimum wage. Against expanding our right to vote. Against the American Rescue Plan. **And he voted against certifying the election results moments after the white supremacist insurrectionist attack on the Capitol.**
[**_Ted Budd should be expelled from Congress, not promoted to the Senate. Will you make a contribution to help us reach our 1,000 donation goal before midnight tonight and help keep Ted Budd far away from the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/631?refcode=em20210429-59&t=20&akid=59%2E3698%2E4pgRdp)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/631?refcode=em20210429-59&t=21&akid=59%2E3698%2E4pgRdp)**
**Look, Ted Budd is just the latest candidate to join North Carolina’s race for the Senate in 2022** — and the contrast between Erica and far-right Republicans like Ted Budd (or any establishment Democrat) in this race couldn’t be starker.
Erica is the only candidate brave enough to shake the status quo, fighting to deliver policies bold enough and big enough to create transformative change for working people — like a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and real justice reform.
**But in an increasingly crowded and competitive field, we need your support to help us stand out and win.**
We don’t have millions in the bank or wealthy donors with deep pockets cutting big checks. A scrappy campaign like ours relies on folks like you chipping in what they can when they can.
[**Right now, we’re 42 donations away from hitting our goal of 1,000 donations this month. Make a contribution — of any amount — to our campaign to help us close the gap and show your support for building progressive power in the Senate.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/631?refcode=em20210429-59&t=22&akid=59%2E3698%2E4pgRdp)
Thank you for being in this movement with us,
Team Erica Smith

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Huge win!!
body:
For the past three months, I’ve been doing everything possible to help pass legislation in Florida that will fine Big Tech for de-platforming candidates for office and censoring conservatives.
---
For the past three months, I’ve been doing everything possible to help pass legislation in Florida that will fine Big Tech for de-platforming candidates for office and censoring conservatives.

| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/ekRHAmEUOXo5aumJ3EWazoF4G-LGzjtMrX2GX5ESLoQk5nmOC2Z9TyY9MpUK_M00zWLWPrfRxhp02fofLmiDU6LGb0vw2X6ME8QxtlvZLbRfFgNuKKEGK5-vrBayrVBV6lMX25DWb4wJ9d0ufW-CrIGw55dY8E-9Td1B0Lg1pUyOV21aiNPuoVQPh4v4aiksHxQRA6YjUSj922gwNKhZ3CL1rQtlURTltXbce_YSuEMAbvy55xpBxwMZvQovcpnxI1ezZxx6M_q6DPLR25NO9eZubTtby5S9FNL7MC8U_OqaVBl7) For the past three months, I’ve been doing everything possible to help pass legislation in Florida that will fine Big Tech for de-platforming candidates for office and censoring conservatives.

**This week, the Florida Senate and House passed the bill!**

Tomorrow, it’s headed to Governor Ron DeSantis for his signature, but we have a last minute push we need to do to strengthen the bill.

[**Can you chip in your support with $20, $50 or more to help cover the costs of this drive?**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/Bc9brLBqkXfYXGfgxkg5m4YKAzbi5D0_ZQzC4K8Ft7vlWT4W4EgzHZYVEA4wWqoF5lk9JG0M9yo3tEMd8lPAdPp7C5Au6A6_aPqD_zP9TZf9QZUrTq68_bv9jrtX6Abzf0za-cdn-RTID6gymjW06-8kQgeyHozJmV_AqlxSKZJ8FtPedwD9kVjoU6w50L24Fx_bmWVI3JB-wHBpr-MW5FIBXZ5bRciqWuxwRo6kehF6s2PVdj9VlY5OCpeMEF4F61VJhY-GWs4mdeucYmmjzgOvdcSDKpM01bvy48BjXZdAzRw3)

Last night, **I had a chance to speak with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago** and we discussed this bill.

As it stands, the bill is NOT retroactive – I’ve already been banned and so has President Trump and many others.

Twitter and Facebook would get away with future election interference by keeping their past bans in place, and the bill does nothing to protect candidates like myself who have previously been banned.

If President Trump decides to run in 2024, the bill would not provide protection for him since he’s already been deplatformed.

But we can fix this!

When I told President Trump the bill was not retroactive, he seemed surprised and concerned – and he encouraged us to keep up the great work.

We’re in the final stretch and want to make this the starting point to stop Cancel Culture around the nation.

If you can, [**help me cover my costs over the past three months**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/cxg8zQQt8VR4E8zFhNDwavQpaegLt90LygDWRxRXAQdwjBOwbY09ObQGhG5uf4iEeYeOEnxgP7ai2i_FcOiZWFVltc2xx1nHjFddsLnP-uzx_5T4GHPVJr3kI9EAcvLrAyY7eNZeLxnWuKbwPzq7gvAwXYMwfJe09Xum823i1y1kDNinZcAzdzUJFylikqEKDuDzKEQGUZUrkYI8dVvb6g1_MGKcnpaKK_oY_xC5yvBPWKPpNNcbIW0B8OFyRs91Mb6JO2CBF3WZJ2Tn2xH0d7ur4jOgKB4FqPrvRwFli8YTowQy).

Just this week, I organized a rally on “Trump Corner” with Michelle Malkin, pro-life activist Willy Guardiola and former Senate Republican Nominee Lauren Witzke.

The setup and signs for the event cost me close to $1,000 – not to mention all of the travel to Tallahassee, which has been crazy.

**But it’s been worth it, with both houses of the Florida Legislature passing the bill!**

This is a good first step, but make no mistake, the bill still needs to be amended and perfected in order for it to have teeth.

When Governor DeSantis signs the bill tomorrow, it sets the foundation for states around the country to enact similar laws – and **we take a first big step in stopping election interference by Big Tech**.

However, as I said, this just _the first step_ and much more work needs to be done to strengthen this bill.

[**Pitch in any amount you can to help offset my costs**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/syg5GWBL-j18P8lgivTyBt_ETzpfI7nAZLP_9KVWvySibmQPpK0jJlsYMlHDMPV1gwDdce-w3Du2byKdznxAVUCSAJUJ-OHDEhlsoNyyd2A1_yBjBIHq8QyyACPUEBdyguv_hkshIIxLnx2wCTevY71PoT1_4l8cMhMbnNMojF0dsJvtWuxlUM1br5UC0-M8OLquaSjx7FTT1nmKoyqvjtRwT2QJtlMCHT3vMwOEX5VI--Tomk6Q0kuj5Y6OjfrAIuDAlqtV32ZjfUflL07SjAktHCwP1uGxTRTsU60tJbMONiD3) and I’ll report back as soon as I have another moment to sit down.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
© 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/OanJ6vvafF-2PknMEBpST1QC41hcMj1iVN0NEOy6oudfupgWMHiANC7g34YJannoijvMjkdedE88uxN6ErYX--kVAy3aUjztpIEh8GOO8M447LlKPQ9fprmR1lGxcFVkFx1-Q0sD3IAwCg3J)
