[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28418793/283185711/1999088365?refcode=em-210429&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiZjc4ODExLTNhYTktZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bkey-nv57opOMfBWhzRPomEfCCvFSFuxhmUO2qBz8Hs=)

subject: Biden’s agenda is even more radical than we thought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |

With an agenda like this, it’s more clear than ever that we need strong conservative governors as the last line of defense in our states. * Trillions in new spending and tax hikes to pay for it
* Gun control policies that strip law-abiding citizens of their constitutional rights
* An infrastructure bill that covers barely any infrastructure
* And there’s no end in sight to the border crisis he’s created!

With an agenda like this, it’s more clear than ever that we need strong conservative governors as the last line of defense in our states. I am ready to stand strong as one of those governors. Can you chip in now to help? [**MAKE AN URGENT DONATION >> **](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=e86c301d9aa8489c949cfba88bfbada5&_e=EKGG4N6NTTbnEATj8J4csmQFj3eRp3OosiL4MiFLBj2Lm3I9DlU6WlVryPf0Kx_80uVzOyFfYeuGPndpu2Gvdi9Bg77hxNzlUB-ukdqjKOVqM4w47v-gF_rCmEpjF-4MppGUkL0qec5LTLmPcSQUaF3xKQy226yO9u6q19JyVODczrvrAtEeo3RLycYYcqfuDHOyfWesWfkz4q9xeKR5iM2WGwLR5uRh45MIUhCmYfSidEINwpCavKmnMATW4LQRBLs5_SSnGmp8h5hMo8Jd3CK3Wd7n7f6B0hShWaJEYtUuF7TE3wGimAnPdb0F4D3PNrG6axCURr4n9EUEl47Ll9XMiJ7vh2zvo9zKej_K8S5GTsDz5taDlOL1A8zm2Qax8_YlhXVwLx05XQi9Zywd2yUUU84Lr_T6YHsAM0RUwy0HLlLFB8q23b32naWm5bAniNrDGz72n2wwg3YFZWnoOT0J_MGlSLqf7ty49MNFKwk%3D) Peter, I have a clear vision to stand up to the radical left:
* Defend our right to be free of socialism and tyranny
* Preserve our Second Amendment and your right to keep your family safe
* Protect our freedom of speech and religious liberty

_And we really need your help to make sure we stay ahead. That's why we set a goal of raising $25,000!_ Peter, we both know it’s time for America's governors to stand up and do what is RIGHT, not what is politically correct. And your support today helps prove that we don't need to win favor with the elites or media - only defend the hard-working men and women who make this country great from the destructive plans of the Biden-Harris administration. Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

| Dear Patriot, Someone's watching you. **And the information they're gathering about you will be kept on record forever.** Joe Biden's intelligence agencies are circumventing the Constitution by purchasing your private data from third-party vendors. These Left-wing intelligence agencies have shown how hostile they are towards anyone who questions their authority. They even spent four years spying on President Trump and leaking fake news to the media, to try and destroy his Presidency. If the intelligence community has already been caught trying to "cancel" President Trump, how can they be trusted with the most sensitive information of American citizens? **Imagine these "cancel culture" radicals having access to every statement you have ever made -- even in private.**

| I can't allow good conservative Americans like you to have their data stolen by lawless secret spy agencies. That's why I, along with 19 other Senators, have introduced the Fourth Amendment Is Not For Sale Act. This bill would ban any government agency from buying private information about innocent Americans from third-party brokers. **The Constitution is clear -- get a warrant!** Unfortunately, special interests are putting tremendous pressure on my colleagues not to sponsor this bill. And many swamp rats in D.C. think it's perfectly fine to take away Americans' God-given rights. That's why I need you to step up immediately. [This bill is absolutely critical, and I need your help building support for it. Can you pitch in $100, $50, $25, or $10 today?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2BlR2U7omAhGtUUZGUazUSv34vrsZhsMFPmr4rYFmgJaABun4Nz8z198ra83JqyrUpCm4FwPpYQ3DWLIWLk-2Fxv73ngcNUzY4zJCcRCAcL7eOrHXKoyM00SdCdqSD79hWixApROneEzOF3NXldQMp-2BykAVfh_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7RSePM-2BriHcLV68kOFEdeT4QpPW3dKJgyrr6Ubx2E-2FrfgLSpLM5ypW2QL-2FPYYOPk0sRWiKy-2FxwIxiXqyfhOvkRKZkEBI4CFd5-2FDocBgmcm20mPNO6ga4G9-2FAmw9gK8SRDrusxTjSjA85lLRV6Fp5eyVHVoh2Zwv2yBomiXXAIy43khG-2FY2PSxAE1eVgSNhl5eYMBLqdAM42kX4VafljEogeKs0gf6IoPXWKLjryiTZMhb4Zw3jQso7ZAJ18w8OA6DeaNsYL2lyPLo9reaZfMTfXcdeB7XfTjWAC3q3gcS-2BvDKVLztuCA0rH-2Fbv-2FCZrr9htUtx2HICITu4AxUA1jMeOg-3D-3D) With your help, I can put pressure on my colleagues to join as co-sponsors, by showing them that Americans are sick of lawless government. America has been down this road before. In 2013, Edward Snowden revealed how Barack Obama had been vacuuming up the phone and email records of nearly every American citizen. Last August, I publicly called for Mr. Snowden's pardon, because telling the truth about Barack Obama was a courageous act. Since then, the Left-wing media has swept the issue under the rug. But the illegal spying has carried on. And now I'm worried that our Fourth Amendment might be in mortal danger. That's why I'm making the Fourth Amendment Is Not For Sale Act one of my top priorities in this Congress. And I need you to stand with me. You see, the D.C. Establishment thinks that Americans aren't paying attention to their rights being taken away. They think you don't care about the Fourth Amendment. Only you can help me prove them wrong. And with your help, I can pressure my colleagues to sign onto this crucial bill to protect our God-given right to be left alone. [I need you to help me build support for the Fourth Amendment Is Not For Sale Act. Joe Biden's intelligence agencies are circumventing the Constitution by purchasing your private data from third-party vendors. These Left-wing intelligence agencies have shown how hostile they are towards anyone who questions their authority. They even spent four years spying on President Trump and leaking fake news to the media, to try and destroy his Presidency. If the intelligence community has already been caught trying to "cancel" President Trump, how can they be trusted with the most sensitive information of American citizens? Imagine these "cancel culture" radicals having access to every statement you have ever made -- even in private. | | I can't allow good conservative Americans like you to have their data stolen by lawless secret spy agencies. That's why I, along with 19 other Senators, have introduced the Fourth Amendment Is Not For Sale Act. This bill would ban any government agency from buying private information about innocent Americans from third-party brokers. The Constitution is clear -- get a warrant! Unfortunately, special interests are putting tremendous pressure on my colleagues not to sponsor this bill. And many swamp rats in D.C. think it's perfectly fine to take away Americans' God-given rights. That's why I need you to step up immediately. With your help, I can put pressure on my colleagues to join as co-sponsors, by showing them that Americans are sick of lawless government. America has been down this road before. In 2013, Edward Snowden revealed how Barack Obama had been vacuuming up the phone and email records of nearly every American citizen. Last August, I publicly called for Mr. Snowden's pardon, because telling the truth about Barack Obama was a courageous act. Since then, the Left-wing media has swept the issue under the rug. But the illegal spying has carried on. And now I'm worried that our Fourth Amendment might be in mortal danger. That's why I'm making the Fourth Amendment Is Not For Sale Act one of my top priorities in this Congress. And I need you to stand with me. You see, the D.C. Establishment thinks that Americans aren't paying attention to their rights being taken away. They think you don't care about the Fourth Amendment. Only you can help me prove them wrong. And with your help, I can pressure my colleagues to sign onto this crucial bill to protect our God-given right to be left alone. Joe Biden -- stop snooping on our private lives, and stop selling our Constitutional rights away. In Liberty, | | ** Rand Paul U.S. Senator (R-KY) P.S. Joe Biden's intelligence agencies are buying and storing your most sensitive personal data. The same people who spied on President Trump and tried to destroy him, are now trying to gain access to all of your personal records. I refuse to let "cancel culture" radicals gain access to your most sensitive information. That's why I helped introduce the Fourth Amendment Is Not For Sale Act. But the Biden Administration bureaucrats and the special interests are pushing back hard. And they're trying to pressure Congress to kill this bill. ** | | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Kevin Hern
subject: 100 Days of President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/6e6b51d5d8663868c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, Did you catch President Biden’s address to the nation last night? It was his first primetime address, and his first one to a joint session of Congress. Starting today, Biden, Kamala Harris, and their spouses are traveling the country on their “Getting America Back on Track” tour. Mostly they will be singing their own praises about what a wonderful job they’ve supposedly done in the first 100 days, but they will also be touting their brazenly misnamed “American Jobs Plan.” They’re claiming it’s to rebuild our nation’s infrastructure, but only a tiny sliver of the proposed multi-TRILLION in spending is actually allocated for things like roads and bridges. _It’s nothing more than the greatest tax hike since World War II to fund radical leftist schemes for social engineering!_ And it’s not just the “rich” who will be paying for it. This is going to hurt every single small business in America. It’s going to hurt or even destroy your ability to pass your business down to your children. It’s going to affect jobs in your community, and your ability to find an honest day’s work. President Trump understood what keeps the wheels of business turning and the economy booming. It’s why we had one of the greatest economic booms our country has ever seen under his leadership. _**Now Biden is taking a sledgehammer to it!**_ He is killing jobs and leaving families worse off, and trying to hand out money to protect his own partisan special interests. It’s simply not workable or sustainable, and we have to STOP him and the rest of the radical left before they fundamentally transform everything that makes America great. We don’t need trillions in new tax-and-spend policies — we need to let America get back to work. **If you want to help me stop the Democrats’ plan to destroy the America we know and love, please chip in now to send a message that we’re NOT going to stand down**. [**CHIP IN NOW TO SAVE AMERICA >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/52e26b2ca20e3bc2c3d6b838967d376c/34143) We need to share our message of commonsense conservatism far and wide. I firmly believe that individual citizens know much better how to run their own lives than elitist politicians in D.C. Joe Biden is pushing social engineering, and slapping every working American with the bill. **[Make your voice heard by sending your best gift right now to help fight back!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/47eef88deffe4aa6c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** For America’s future,
Kevin Hern [**RUSH A $5 DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/42a31e9189c47c15c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH A $10 DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/027adfdf7a0768b8c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH A $20 DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/6ef2101bb29b8510c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH A $35 DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/2adc89f64e247ab2c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH A $50 DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/378d45c595e6a9dec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/ab54e29c457aed77c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fd7c04d3a7231218/c0e76c19103aa4d7c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: A historic legislative session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is what progress looks like.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/RaxXsVrz3xCq/Sk1xSzdQQ2VsYU1HQVo3eHRpLzhVRVFsY2UrWEc2YTlTZFZJRXViTnhqREl6cnlJSU1TNEpOeE1IZ05IWHZaZ1RTYjEzb2RjbmVjd05iWlNxaFpQQVlyMFB5cUQzakN0cC9DTlhIUGl0SFk9S0/Z0FwdXp5VUZaOXBwTDExWXhNaUUyV0pJcjMraVlsOUUxeHQ5N0ZseEdJWT0S1) Friend, If you want to know what bold, innovative progress looks like, look at what we just accomplished in Washington. Last weekend, lawmakers wrapped up a historic session that brought remarkable progress on climate, equity, and more. Their work will improve the lives of every Washingtonian and become a progressive roadmap for action across the country. All this could never have happened without countless Washingtonians being part of the movement: voting, contacting their elected representatives, educating their friends, ensuring their voices were heard. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of the action. Here are just a few highlights from the session: ✅ We made historic progress in the fight to end the climate crisis. We passed the Climate Commitment Act to limit and reduce greenhouse gas emissions across our economy and invest in programs that expand clean transportation and improve air quality. ✅ We passed a clean fuel standard, which promotes the use of electric vehicles and lower-carbon fuels, leading to reduced carbon emissions and new, local jobs in clean energy. ✅ We made our regressive tax system fairer by passing a capital gains tax and funding the Working Families Tax Credit, bringing us closer to a system in which every Washingtonian pays their fair share. ✅ We're taking action to reform policing in the pursuit of justice. We funded a new office to investigate police use-of-force cases and restored voting rights to formerly incarcerated Washingtonians. ✅ We're taking aggressive action on gun safety. We banned the open carry of firearms at the State Capitol and permitted protest sites. ✅ We grew our commitment to defeating this pandemic and supporting Washingtonians through this crisis. We allocated $1.1 billion in federal funds to help households impacted by the pandemic avoid eviction or foreclosure and to boost testing, contact tracing, and vaccine distribution. We've been working toward these policies for years, and I'm thrilled to sign them into law. Thank you for stepping up and adding your voice to demand progress. Because of you, we're making history -- and continuing to **[make Washington the best state to call home.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/baPjsmyZ_XQj/Sk1xSzdQQ2VsYU1HQVo3eHRpLzhVRVFsY2UrWEc2YTlTZFZJRXViTnhqREl6cnlJSU1TNEpOeE1IZ05IWHZaZ1RTYjEzb2RjbmVjd05iWlNxaFpQQVlyMFB5cUQzakN0cC9DTlhIUGl0SFk9S0/)** Very truly yours, Jay | [DONATE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/erqjJVDLewCR/Sk1xSzdQQ2VsYU1HQVo3eHRpLzhVRVFsY2UrWEc2YTlTZFZJRXViTnhqREl6cnlJSU1TNEpOeE1IZ05IWHZaZ1RTYjEzb2RjbmVjd05iWlNxaFpQQVlyMFB5cUQzakN0cC9DTlhIUGl0SFk9S0/Z0FwdXp5VUZaOXBwTDExWXhNaUUyV0pJcjMraVlsOUUxeHQ5N0ZseEdJWT0S1)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=18703519&r=NjM1MTU5NDU3MzQ5S0&j=MjEwNDQ4MDY5MwS2&l=11250994&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---

We allocated $1.1 billion in federal funds to help households impacted by the pandemic avoid eviction or foreclosure and to boost testing, contact tracing, and vaccine distribution. We've been working toward these policies for years, and I'm thrilled to sign them into law. Thank you for stepping up and adding your voice to demand progress. Because of you, we're making history -- and continuing to Very truly yours, Jay |

Thank you, Mark Warren Finance Director Minnesota House DFL Campaign | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. We are prohibited from taking PAC and lobbyist contributions during the legislative session. DFL House Caucus 255 E Plato Blvd Saint Paul MN 55107 United States = = = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: Sitting Congresswoman calls for Riots, what do you think?
body:
Guess which sitting member of Congress just called for rioters to implement street justice in your neighborhood if they don't get verdicts they like? | | | Dear Patriot,

Many of you followed the recent George Floyd trial in Minnesota and watched over the last year how our communities were set ablaze by anarchists and rioters who want to tear apart the fabric of our Constitutional Republic. I want your feedback after you read this email by clicking [**HERE**](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=9b4c501c30&e=4d7c0901a7).
---
| |
---
Inflammatory Congresswoman, Maxine Waters, recently said to the radical mob that if she didn’t get the verdict she wanted in the trial of Derek Chauvin, **"we've got to stay on the street. We have to get more active, we've got to get more confrontational."** blowing her racial dog whistle loud and clear to send a signal to what she knows are violent mobs to act out and burn our cities to the ground!
---
| Maxine Water's reckless rhetoric stands in stark contrast to anything that was said on January 6, 2021 by Trump supporters, yet the radical left is leveraging the government to harass innocent Americans, while letting Mad Maxine off the hook.

This isn't the first time Maxine Waters has advocated for violence. Back in 2018, she said "If you see anybody from that [Trump] cabinet in a restaurant, in a department store, at a gas station, you get out and create a crowd. And you tell them they're not welcome anymore". This is yet another example of her incitement directives that were acted upon where innocent individuals and their families were targeted. **_They are taking the WOKE culture to the extreme and not just targeting politicians, but they are going after police, mothers, fathers, American’s jobs, your children, and it has to stop NOW!_****__**

Click [**_HERE_**](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=982a64c35c&e=4d7c0901a7) to take a quick survey to tell me what you think about this.

My opponent, Lois Frankel, has been an enabler of her colleague Maxine Waters and recently supported tabling the motion to Censure Maxine Waters due to the radical left’s narrow margin of control of the House of Representatives.

We need to send a message to Lois Frankel that her tolerance of violent radicals and thugs who threaten our communities, small businesses, and the safety of every day Americans will NOT be tolerated.

In 2022, I’m going to send Lazy Lois packing with your support!

**Please[ DONATE](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=771fc94c01&e=4d7c0901a7) today to help me get to Congress!**

The Democrats recently stopped efforts by the Republicans to censure Maxine Waters and were only able to do so by a few votes. As a double standard, they in the past have stripped America First fighters like my friend Marjorie Taylor Greene of her committee assignments for simply exercising freedom of speech. This double standard and hypocrisy cannot stand any longer.

With your [_**generous support**_](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=9b204a4a33&e=4d7c0901a7), I can be a vocal voice to send a message to Lois Frankel and the radical Left that they might be in the majority today in Congress, but they do not have a mandate to tear apart America and target Americans.
---
| |
---
I’ve taken radicals like Maxine Waters head on.

In 2018, I filed a police report against her and pressed assault charges against her after she slapped me in the face in the elevator in Congress.
---
| |
---
As you know, in 2020, the first time I ran for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District, I had the honor of receiving President Trump’s endorsement, and his vote, as well as First Lady Melania Trump’s vote.

I have since filed to run for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District again for the 2022 election, and I need your support to win and flip President Trump’s home district Red!
---
| **_As President Trump once famously said, “Never, ever give up.” I will never give up in the fight to save America, or the fight to Stop the Radical Left from tearing our country apart. That’s my promise to you, the voters of Florida’s 21st District, and all Americans._

Please donate today and help send a real fighter to Congress!**
---
| | [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=c8c9cbeac6&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
|
---
| Thank you so much for your [support](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=46219177e6&e=4d7c0901a7)[!](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=80c7bd5621&e=4d7c0901a7)

Truthfully
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer

---
|
---

You can [update your preferences](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=01673190d5) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=01673190d5).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: The era of big government is back...🚨
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0a169ee87418/the-era-of-big-government-is-back?e=f6564bbe3b)
Logo

** My reaction to Biden’s first joint address to Congress...
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.instagram.com/p/COQc176jaLr/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID

** The future of the America First movement...
------------------------------------------------------------

This week on Spicer & Co (http://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID) we’ve highlighted the efforts of those in the Trump administration that have continued to advance the America First agenda.

Brooke Rollins joined us Tuesday (https://twitter.com/A1Policy/status/1387217515680604160?s=20&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID) to discuss the efforts of America First Policy Institute to continue to promote the Trump administration’s agenda.
https://twitter.com/A1Policy/status/1387217515680604160?s=20&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID

** California governor recall campaign is successful...
------------------------------------------------------------

Its official, there will be a recall election in California (https://www.nytimes.com/2021/04/26/us/recall-gavin-newsom-california.html?mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID) for Governor. This comes after months lockdowns that have proven ineffective, hypocrisy from Governor Newsom failed policies.

Maybe now democrat leaders will learn that poor leadership and bad policies actually have consequences...
https://twitter.com/pnjaban/status/1387492068696596483?s=20&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID

I want to know...
https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1387581763564748800?s=20&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID
https://www.amazon.com/Lucky-How-Biden-Barely-Presidency/dp/0525574220?crid=23VFHC7CVJIYT&dchild=1&keywords=lucky+amie+parnes&qid=1619640636&sprefix=lucky+amie+pa%2Caps%2C155&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=ba141284fa2501311b20f080ba2de7b7&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID

** What I’m Reading This Week...
------------------------------------------------------------

A little while ago on the show we had the authors of this book on to discuss it.

It really is an interesting look at all of the instances where Biden got “Lucky” which led to him winning the nomination and ultimately the election.

After last night’s speech I highly recommend checking this one out.
Get a Copy Here (https://www.amazon.com/Lucky-How-Biden-Barely-Presidency/dp/0525574220?crid=23VFHC7CVJIYT&dchild=1&keywords=lucky+amie+parnes&qid=1619640636&sprefix=lucky+amie+pa%2Caps%2C155&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=ba141284fa2501311b20f080ba2de7b7&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** Take your kids to work day in 2017...
------------------------------------------------------------

I shared some photos from bring your kids to work day in 2017 at the White House.

What started as a fun day for the kids was ruined by certain members of the press...
Read the story here (https://www.instagram.com/p/COLg46agFJK/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&mc_cid=582f8f7d2e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI5MjIyMDU5]

Judicial Watch received 540 pages and a supplemental four
pages of documents from the office of the Secretary of State of
California revealing how state officials pressured social media
companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about
the 2020 election. Alejandro Padilla, secretary of state at the time,
succeeded Kamala Harris in the U.S. Senate.

[13x13x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI5MjIyMDU5]
READ MORE
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI5MjIyMDU5]

MAJOR MEDIA REPORTS

[180x150x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22766&F=T&]

2021-04-28

California Officials, Biden-Linked Firm Coordinated With Big Tech
to Censor Election Posts: Judicial Watch
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22766&F=T&]

Source: The Epoch Times
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22766&F=T&]

California officials colluded with Big Tech to censor social
media posts during the 2020 presidential election, Judicial Watch
announced. A report surfaced revealing that California’s Office of
Election Cybersecurity asked the social media giants to remove or flag
as “misleading” at least two dozen messages. SKDKnickerbocker, a
communications company linked to President Joe Biden’s election
campaign, was involved. SKDKnickerbocker was co-founded by Anita
Dunn, a senior adviser to President-elect Joe Biden’s campaign and
co-chairman of his transition team.

[13x13x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22766&F=T&]
READ MORE
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22766&F=T&]

[180x150x2]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22767&F=T&]

2021-04-27

Judicial Watch claims California pressured Big Tech to censor
posts about the 2020 election
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22767&F=T&]

Source: Just the News
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22767&F=T&]

The documents found the Office of Election Cybersecurity in the
California Secretary of State’s office monitored and tracked social
media posts. The office decided whether the posts were
misinformation, then stored them in an internal database. On 31
different occasions, the office requested posts be removed.

[13x13x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22767&F=T&]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53554&L=22768&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL3RlY2hub2xvZ3kvY2EtYmlnLXRlY2gtYmlkZW4tY2Vuc29yc2hpcC1qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI5MjIyMDU5]

campaign played a role in determining which posts should be censored

with Twitter, Facebook and Google.

name: Martha Brooks
subject: Don’t tell Mo -- it’s a birthday surprise!🎂
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
I have a special favor to ask of you.
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_29_eom_email_blast&n=1)
---

| Peter -- Martha Brooks, here! I have a special favor to ask of you. It’s Mo’s birthday today, and I thought it’d be nice to pass around a birthday card to our MAGA family ❤️❤️❤️ [**If you have a moment to spare, would you please sign Mo’s card and send it around to your friends to sign too?**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG8f_lA3ExifBGeu_D8Lyje9zZ0wnrHXBMOwdVYvm_1T2&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_29_eom_email_blast&n=2) [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG8f_lA3ExifBGeu_D8Lyje9zZ0wnrHXBMOwdVYvm_1T2&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_29_eom_email_blast&n=3) I can’t wait to sit down with Mo this weekend and show him everyone’s comments! [**Even if you just add your name, I know he’d appreciate the thought.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG8f_lA3ExifBGeu_D8Lyje9zZ0wnrHXBMOwdVYvm_1T2&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_29_eom_email_blast&n=4) As always, thank you for supporting my husband, Mo, in his race to represent Alabama in the U.S. Senate. Your trust and encouragement mean the world to our family. Sincerely,
Martha Brooks
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_29_eom_email_blast&n=5).

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Biden’s speech last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
This is a complete disservice to the country, especially when it's during a time when you want to unify and bring people together. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fd001470636f49fdba6e676ede7c390d&_e=kcBfpqPSMDp9oQcjhr7fPkYfoPJ3RiBqwWg-rqo_46BFbVItHPQITbHWFKW5tyYY1c7jOdVJp9dw4Wt_G_CBRXcM5dOERiLUMD7h7HR8cdCGgDqrK8KCP34nIZgYi2wluZ4EnMrsQU0U-jj5poe4CMfv3P9hDu0cV62NSELhJPLnnxTGx8EovhK6FsYfP6xugmAWiUHdUeg1EKzA_r7drsPmG2-gEtGhilUEC54PdxSJTRIJZHo3Czxw4BllRuN6tdptzoJetdwLYrx8-W7O_qcruiG9sioQyrWIz9jvlqA2bAWZyYqGDDjM6oZ-p86pM_IF0upcgvgaZTwOkFg-b0uD0FTqOGexVnIq3rfo8NkUS299w7ZjMdq1i7sOXxLlJHq8-jXWwI6OSQdxrHeHXS5YOSBSLY1XxHhu_65lKOWL9pPJjDcJDuOwSFrQHZe1DGlJz4hsg-5iCTtdAdapYKO3NzykNRk3YVfaF1GWCJk%3D) Friend, Usually, when the President of the United States hosts a Joint Address, everyone in Congress is invited to watch him speak. But not this year. This year, I watched from my couch with a margarita in hand because Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden decided to host their own invite-only party. Honestly, I don’t even think he should be able to call it a Joint Address! This is a complete disservice to the country, especially when it's during a time when you want to unify and bring people together. **[I AGREE: SIGN THE PETITION>> ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fd001470636f49fdba6e676ede7c390d&_e=kcBfpqPSMDp9oQcjhr7fPkYfoPJ3RiBqwWg-rqo_46BFbVItHPQITbHWFKW5tyYY1c7jOdVJp9dw4Wt_G_CBRXcM5dOERiLUMD7h7HR8cdCGgDqrK8KCP34nIZgYi2wluZ4EnMrsQU0U-jj5poe4CMfv3P9hDu0cV62NSELhJPLnnxTGx8EovhK6FsYfP6xugmAWiUHdUeg1EKzA_r7drsPmG2-gEtGhilUEC54PdxSJTRIJZHo3Czxw4BllRuN6tdptzoJetdwLYrx8-W7O_qmFI9OLgfZds8xymWv3nkErgULglk_H69ITGbeVbd8tPVRhpF5xt2Zx78wPCWiWLwjjZnc74vISyDKagQFCubPQkwjjAFV8Akalzm1o3WRwo-EmsNnZEbBBtEgGJESDUvT933Jbxa7nFz6E2Tzf9NeeEoyNkTTKmDwFBNTKUuIz-uPcO60FogiDbkP-ymDXG_h1uNQHF-NUu3ZZj0n6Xec%3D)** The entire event should have been an opportunity for real conversations about the real solutions Americans need. Instead, it turned into a woke virtue signaling contest of vaccinated Democrats, who were double masked, doing social-distanced air first bumps for the cameras. _Put frankly: it was stupid. _ **The people deserve better than the games Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are playing right now.** We've got to be able to recognize that there are issues that we need to listen to each other on and work together. That isn't going to happen if they're closing the door in the faces of anyone they might disagree with, like they did last night. I'm sending a message to them both that it's time to get over the partisan politics and I want you to join me by adding your name to my petition today: **[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/sotu-147278/](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fd001470636f49fdba6e676ede7c390d&_e=kcBfpqPSMDp9oQcjhr7fPkYfoPJ3RiBqwWg-rqo_46BFbVItHPQITbHWFKW5tyYY1c7jOdVJp9dw4Wt_G_CBRXcM5dOERiLUMD7h7HR8cdCGgDqrK8KCP34nIZgYi2wluZ4EnMrsQU0U-jj5poe4CMfv3P9hDu0cV62NSELhJPLnnxTGx8EovhK6FsYfP6xugmAWiUHdUeg1EKzA_r7drsPmG2-gEtGhilUEC54PdxSJTRIJZHo3Czxw4BllRuN6tdptzoJetdwLYrx8-W7O_nGiudq4xFMDxNq_xXF8TzeDdQufzdAUdjTQNMdMqSFXV_9ED-SRaDRdpgc9GiOqiTH3uOp5iOdHFEdK71ngDeUdD_nxxkYv3dBCHR370FWKCHUqzl4TacdV2aGIME_TZeUEhMJt41KVhOY3I3ywNfZSqPoY0x7nW1gbTJ4FU02kk9dYsthSibZ6FvhLYG7SgoikES09_j2w-4almYojdzw%3D)** We need to come together to make a Washington that works for the people. I won’t stop until it does. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fd001470636f49fdba6e676ede7c390d&_e=kcBfpqPSMDp9oQcjhr7fPkYfoPJ3RiBqwWg-rqo_46BFbVItHPQITbHWFKW5tyYY1c7jOdVJp9dw4Wt_G_CBRXcM5dOERiLUMD7h7HR8cdCGgDqrK8KCP34nIZgYi2wluZ4EnMrsQU0U-jj5poe4CMfv3P9hDu0cV62NSELhJPLnnxTGx8EovhK6FsYfP6xugmAWiUHdUeg1EKzA_r7drsPmG2-gEtGhilUEC54PdxSJTRIJZHo3Czxw4BllRuN6tdptzoJetdwLYrx8-W7O_ryR61FBrC1srQhUkwOsrmGHeP65vgyJDw130R-ZEjk_VosrQfp1RkT2AY0d0tqy41l0XPpixVO-tgaXNtomFEI0MAgWSaGD5rZYr5BP1Hf4mYlxp36-zYROsimWY4c8WACDUelcunHVgkv-BWRMm2vH4BdfhcgvBrFRXeOn2UX_b7G66Yxw402tFqPA8MD-ZnO37xkDi-IvdLAd7wSookg%3D) Nancy Mace |
